',pos:'center',accent:'#d6aa6f',accent2:'#839a7d'},
      {hours:[18,20],city:'Venezia',it:'Tramonto',en:'Sunset',time:'18—20',img:'data:image/webp;base64,',pos:'center',accent:'#d08170',accent2:'#758c98'},
      {hours:[21,23],city:'Bologna',it:'Sera',en:'Evening',time:'21—23',img:'data:image/webp;base64,',pos:'center',accent:'#c99d68',accent2:'#776f63'}
    ];
    let timeBasis = localStorage.getItem('gelato-time-basis-v7') || 'Europe/Rome';
    let selectedClockBasis = localStorage.getItem('gelato-clock-basis-v8') || (timeBasis === 'manual' ? 'Europe/Rome' : timeBasis);
    let pendingTimeBasis = null;
    let sceneIndex = Number(localStorage.getItem('gelato-scene-v7'));
    let sceneQuality = localStorage.getItem('gelato-scene-quality-v9') || 'crisp';
    let sceneBlur = Math.max(0,Math.min(18,Number(localStorage.getItem('gelato-scene-blur-v9') || 4)));
    let customSceneImage = localStorage.getItem('gelato-custom-wallpaper-v9') || '';
    if (!Number.isInteger(sceneIndex) || sceneIndex < 0 || sceneIndex >= scenes.length) sceneIndex = scenes.findIndex(scene => {
      const hour = new Date().getHours();
      return hour >= scene.hours[0] && hour <= scene.hours[1];
    });
    if (sceneIndex < 0) sceneIndex = 0;

    function zonedParts(timeZone,date) {
      const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-GB',{timeZone:timeZone,hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',hourCycle:'h23'}).formatToParts(date || new Date());
      return {hour:Number(parts.find(part => part.type === 'hour').value),minute:Number(parts.find(part => part.type === 'minute').value)};
    }
    function partsForBasis(basis) {
      if (basis === 'custom') {
        const value = ($('#customSceneTime') && $('#customSceneTime').value) || '18:30';
        const bits = value.split(':').map(Number);
        return {hour:bits[0] || 0,minute:bits[1] || 0};
      }
      try { return zonedParts(basis); } catch (error) { return zonedParts('Europe/Rome'); }
    }
    function basisParts() {
      return partsForBasis(timeBasis === 'manual' ? selectedClockBasis : timeBasis);
    }
    function sceneForHour(hour) {
      const found = scenes.findIndex(scene => hour >= scene.hours[0] && hour <= scene.hours[1]);
      return found < 0 ? 0 : found;
    }
    function applySceneTheme() {
      const scene = scenes[sceneIndex];
      const image = customSceneImage || scene.img;
      const effectiveBlur = sceneQuality === 'soft' ? Math.max(7,sceneBlur) : sceneBlur;
      const original = effectiveBlur === 0;
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--scene-accent',scene.accent);
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--scene-accent-2',scene.accent2);
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--scene-line','color-mix(in srgb,' + scene.accent + ' 38%,rgba(255,255,255,.16))');
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--scene-image','url("' + image + '")');
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--wall-blur',effectiveBlur + 'px');
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--wall-clarity',original ? '1' : (sceneQuality === 'soft' ? '.78' : '.94'));
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--wall-saturate',original ? '1' : (sceneQuality === 'soft' ? '.76' : String(Math.max(.82,1-effectiveBlur*.012))));
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--wall-contrast',original ? '1' : String(Math.max(.94,1.03-effectiveBlur*.004)));
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--wall-brightness',original ? '1' : String(Math.max(.78,.96-effectiveBlur*.009)));
      setBackdrop(image,customSceneImage ? 'center' : scene.pos);
      if ($('#scenePreviewDot')) $('#scenePreviewDot').style.backgroundImage = 'url("' + image + '")';
      if ($('#sceneBlur')) $('#sceneBlur').value = String(sceneBlur);
      $$('.scene-quality button').forEach(button => button.classList.toggle('on',button.dataset.sceneQuality === sceneQuality));
      localized($('#homeSceneName'),scene.city + ' · ' + scene.it,scene.city + ' · ' + scene.en);
    }
    function storeCustomWallpaper(file) {
      if (!file || !file.type.startsWith('image/')) return;
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = () => {
        const source = new Image();
        source.onload = () => {
          const scale = Math.min(1,1600/source.width,1100/source.height);
          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
          canvas.width = Math.max(1,Math.round(source.width*scale));
          canvas.height = Math.max(1,Math.round(source.height*scale));
          canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(source,0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
          customSceneImage = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.78);
          try { localStorage.setItem('gelato-custom-wallpaper-v9',customSceneImage); } catch (error) { showToast(textFor('L’immagine è troppo grande per essere ricordata.','The image is too large to remember.')); }
          applySceneTheme();
        };
        source.src = String(reader.result);
      };
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    }

    let media = null;
    let current = null;
    let objectUrl = '';
    let pendingFile = null;
    let renameTarget = null;
    let duration = 0;
    let clipA = 0;
    let clipB = 0;
    let loops = 5;
    let loopIndex = 0;
    let repetitions = 0;
    let learningStep = 0;
    let learningModeActive = false;
    let segmentLoopActive = false;
    let maskPanelTimer = null;
    let focusRequired = false;
    let timer = null;
    let sessionSeconds = 0;
    let studySeconds = Number(localStorage.getItem('gelato-study') || 0);
    const localDateKey = date => {
      const value = date || new Date();
      return value.getFullYear() + '-' + String(value.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(value.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
    };
    const todayKey = localDateKey(new Date());
    let dayRecord;
    try { dayRecord = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gelato-study-day') || 'null'); } catch (error) { dayRecord = null; }
    let todaySeconds = dayRecord && dayRecord.date === todayKey ? Number(dayRecord.seconds || 0) : (dayRecord ? 0 : studySeconds);
    let studyLog = [];
    try { studyLog = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gelato-study-log-v7') || '[]'); } catch (error) { studyLog = []; }
    let activeLogRow = null;
    let recordMediaFilter = 'all';
    let recordRange = 'week';

    const learningSteps = [
      {it:'Ascolta il contesto',en:'Listen to the context',stageIt:'ASCOLTA',stageEn:'LISTEN'},
      {it:'Ascolta soltanto',en:'Listen only',stageIt:'ASCOLTA',stageEn:'LISTEN'},
      {it:'Comprendi la frase',en:'Understand the phrase',stageIt:'COMPRENDI',stageEn:'UNDERSTAND'},
      {it:'Ripeti ad alta voce',en:'Repeat aloud',stageIt:'RIPETI',stageEn:'REPEAT'},
      {it:'Ricorda senza audio',en:'Remember without audio',stageIt:'RICORDA',stageEn:'REMEMBER'},
      {it:'Controllo naturale',en:'Natural check',stageIt:'STABILE',stageEn:'STABLE'}
    ];
    const curveMilestones = [
      {step:0,x:'7%',y:'78%',ly:'84%',it:'Ascolta',en:'Listen'},
      {step:1,x:'31%',y:'66%',ly:'72%',it:'Riascolta',en:'Replay'},
      {step:3,x:'55%',y:'49%',ly:'55%',it:'Ripeti',en:'Repeat'},
      {step:4,x:'80%',y:'27%',ly:'33%',it:'Ricorda',en:'Remember'},
      {step:5,x:'95%',y:'10%',ly:'16%',it:'Stabile',en:'Stable'}
    ];

    function formatTime(value, decimal) {
      value = Number.isFinite(value) ? Math.max(0,value) : 0;
      const minutes = Math.floor(value/60);
      const seconds = value%60;
      const tail = decimal ? seconds.toFixed(1).padStart(4,'0') : String(Math.floor(seconds)).padStart(2,'0');
      return String(minutes).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + tail;
    }
    function formatLong(value) {
      value = Math.max(0,Math.floor(value));
      const hours = Math.floor(value/3600);
      const minutes = Math.ceil((value%3600)/60);
      return hours ? hours + 'h ' + minutes + 'm' : minutes + ' min';
    }
    function parseTimeInput(value) {
      const text = String(value || '').trim().replace(',', '.');
      if (!text) return NaN;
      const parts = text.split(':').map(Number);
      if (parts.some(part => !Number.isFinite(part))) return NaN;
      if (parts.length === 1) return parts[0];
      if (parts.length === 2) return parts[0]*60+parts[1];
      return parts[0]*3600+parts[1]*60+parts[2];
    }
    function showToast(message) {
      const el = $('#toast');
      el.textContent = message;
      el.style.display = 'block';
      clearTimeout(el._hide);
      el._hide = setTimeout(() => { el.style.display = 'none'; },2600);
    }
    function switchView(view, silent) {
      if (view === 'player' && !current) {
        if (!silent) showToast(textFor(I18N.it.importFirst,I18N.en.importFirst));
        view = 'home';
      }
      currentView = view;
      document.body.dataset.view = view;
      if (view !== 'scenes') $('#sceneVisualPanel').classList.remove('open');
      $$('.view').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('open',el.id === view + 'View'));
      $$('.nav-button').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('on',el.dataset.view === view));
      applySceneTheme();
      if (view === 'progress') renderProgress();
      if (view === 'time') renderTime();
      if (view === 'scenes') renderScenes();
      if (view === 'album') renderAlbum(true);
      if (view === 'journey') renderJourney();
      if (view === 'culture') renderCulture();
      if (view === 'lexicon') renderLexicon();
      // The album is intentionally a long, scrollable archive. Always return to
      // the beginning when changing rooms so the next page never appears empty.
      window.scrollTo({top:0,left:0,behavior:'auto'});
    }

    function openDb() {
      return new Promise((resolve,reject) => {
        const request = indexedDB.open('gelato-player-v2',1);
        request.onupgradeneeded = () => {
          if (!request.result.objectStoreNames.contains('media')) request.result.createObjectStore('media',{keyPath:'id'});
        };
        request.onsuccess = () => resolve(request.result);
        request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
      });
    }
    async function saveMedia(row) {
      const db = await openDb();
      return new Promise((resolve,reject) => {
        const request = db.transaction('media','readwrite').objectStore('media').put(row);
        request.onsuccess = resolve;
        request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
      });
    }
    async function getAllMedia() {
      const db = await openDb();
      return new Promise((resolve,reject) => {
        const request = db.transaction('media').objectStore('media').getAll();
        request.onsuccess = () => resolve(request.result);
        request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
      });
    }
    async function removeMedia(id) {
      const db = await openDb();
      await new Promise((resolve,reject) => {
        const request = db.transaction('media','readwrite').objectStore('media').delete(id);
        request.onsuccess = resolve;
        request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
      });
      if (current && current.id === id) {
        current = null;
        if (media) { media.pause(); media.remove(); }
        media = null;
        switchView('home',true);
      }
      renderLibrary();
    }
    function cleanFileName(name) {
      return name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'').replace(/[._]+/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().slice(0,80);
    }
    function mediaSupported(file) {
      return file.type.startsWith('audio/') || file.type.startsWith('video/') || /\.(mp3|m4a|wav|aac|ogg|flac|mp4|m4v|mov|webm)$/i.test(file.name);
    }
    function openRenameForFile(file) {
      pendingFile = file;
      renameTarget = null;
      $('#originalFileName').textContent = file.name;
      $('#renameInput').value = cleanFileName(file.name) || textFor('Senza titolo','Untitled');
      $('#renameModal').classList.add('open');
      setTimeout(() => { $('#renameInput').focus(); $('#renameInput').select(); },250);
    }
    function openRenameForRow(row) {
      pendingFile = null;
      renameTarget = row;
      $('#originalFileName').textContent = row.originalName || row.name;
      $('#renameInput').value = cleanFileName(row.name);
      $('#renameModal').classList.add('open');
      setTimeout(() => { $('#renameInput').focus(); $('#renameInput').select(); },250);
    }
    function closeRename(reset) {
      $('#renameModal').classList.remove('open');
      if (reset !== false) {
        pendingFile = null;
        renameTarget = null;
        $('#fileInput').value = '';
      }
    }
    async function confirmRename() {
      const name = $('#renameInput').value.trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ').slice(0,80);
      if (!name) return showToast(textFor(I18N.it.nameRequired,I18N.en.nameRequired));
      if (pendingFile) {
        const file = pendingFile;
        const row = {
          id:crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : String(Date.now()) + '-' + String(Math.random()),
          name:name,
          originalName:file.name,
          type:file.type || (/video/i.test(file.name) ? 'video/*' : 'audio/*'),
          blob:file,
          savedAt:Date.now()
        };
        try {
          await saveMedia(row);
          showToast(textFor(I18N.it.savedLocal,I18N.en.savedLocal));
        } catch (error) {
          showToast(textFor(I18N.it.storageError,I18N.en.storageError));
        }
        closeRename();
        openMedia(row,true);
      } else if (renameTarget) {
        renameTarget.name = name;
        try { await saveMedia(renameTarget); } catch (error) {}
        if (current && current.id === renameTarget.id) {
          current.name = name;
          $('#mediaTitle').textContent = name;
        }
        closeRename();
        renderLibrary();
      }
    }
    async function renderLibrary() {
      let rows = [];
      try { rows = await getAllMedia(); } catch (error) {}
      const wrap = $('#libraryItems');
      wrap.replaceChildren();
      if (!rows.length) {
        const empty = document.createElement('p');
        empty.className = 'empty-library';
        localizedKey(empty,'noMedia');
        wrap.append(empty);
        return;
      }
      rows.sort((a,b) => b.savedAt-a.savedAt).forEach(row => {
        const item = document.createElement('div');
        item.className = 'library-item';
        const isVideo = (row.type && row.type.startsWith('video')) || /\.(mp4|m4v|mov|webm)$/i.test(row.originalName || '');
        const listening = studyLog.filter(entry => entry.mediaId === row.id).reduce((total,entry) => total + Number(entry.seconds || 0),0);
        const latest = studyLog.filter(entry => entry.mediaId === row.id).sort((a,b) => Number(b.startedAt || 0)-Number(a.startedAt || 0))[0];
        const date = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(lang === 'en' ? 'en-GB' : 'it-IT',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}).format(new Date((latest && latest.startedAt) || row.savedAt || Date.now()));
        const kind = document.createElement('span');
        kind.className = 'library-kind';
        kind.textContent = isVideo ? '▷' : '♪';
        const open = document.createElement('button');
        open.className = 'library-open';
        const title = document.createElement('strong');
        title.textContent = cleanFileName(row.name);
        const meta = document.createElement('small');
        const typeLabel = document.createElement('span');
        localized(typeLabel,isVideo ? 'VIDEO' : 'AUDIO',isVideo ? 'VIDEO' : 'AUDIO');
        const dot = document.createElement('i');
        const dateLabel = document.createElement('span');
        dateLabel.textContent = date;
        const listenLabel = document.createElement('span');
        localized(listenLabel,listening ? formatLong(listening) + ' ascoltati' : 'non ancora ascoltato',listening ? formatLong(listening) + ' listened' : 'not listened yet');
        meta.append(typeLabel,dot,dateLabel,listenLabel);
        const line = document.createElement('span');
        line.className = 'library-listen-line';
        line.style.setProperty('--listened',Math.min(100,listening/1800*100) + '%');
        line.innerHTML = '<b></b>';
        open.append(title,meta,line);
        open.onclick = () => { openMedia(row); closeDrawer(); };
        const edit = document.createElement('button');
        edit.className = 'library-edit';
        edit.textContent = '✎';
        edit.title = tr('edit');
        edit.onclick = () => openRenameForRow(row);
        const remove = document.createElement('button');
        remove.className = 'library-remove';
        remove.textContent = '×';
        remove.title = tr('remove');
        remove.onclick = () => removeMedia(row.id);
        const resume = document.createElement('button');
        resume.className = 'library-resume';
        resume.textContent = '↗';
        resume.setAttribute('aria-label',textFor('Apri il file','Open file'));
        resume.onclick = () => { openMedia(row); closeDrawer(); };
        const actions = document.createElement('div');
        actions.className = 'library-actions';
        actions.append(resume,edit,remove);
        item.append(kind,open,actions);
        wrap.append(item);
      });
    }
    function openDrawer() {
      $('#drawer').classList.add('open');
      $('#scrim').classList.add('open');
      renderLibrary();
    }
    function closeDrawer() {
      $('#drawer').classList.remove('open');
      $('#scrim').classList.remove('open');
    }

    function openMedia(row,requireFocus) {
      current = row;
      if (objectUrl) URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrl);
      objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(row.blob);
      if (media) {
        media.pause();
        media.remove();
      }
      const isVideo = (row.type && row.type.startsWith('video')) || /\.(mp4|m4v|mov|webm)$/i.test(row.originalName || '');
      media = document.createElement(isVideo ? 'video' : 'audio');
      media.src = objectUrl;
      media.playsInline = true;
      media.preload = 'metadata';
      media.dataset.paused = 'true';
      $('#stage').prepend(media);
      $('#playerView').classList.toggle('audio-mode',!isVideo);
      $('#playerView').classList.toggle('video-mode',isVideo);
      $('#audioCover').hidden = isVideo;
      $('#maskBtn').hidden = !isVideo;
      $('#captionMask').classList.remove('on');
      $('#maskPanel').classList.remove('open');
      clearTimeout(maskPanelTimer);
      segmentLoopActive = false;
      $('#playSegmentBtn').classList.remove('on');
      $('#mediaTitle').textContent = cleanFileName(row.name);
      $('#audioNowTitle').textContent = cleanFileName(row.name);
      $('#mindClearBtn').classList.add('ready');
      focusRequired = Boolean(requireFocus);
      $('#focusRitual').classList.toggle('required',focusRequired);
      $('#sourceText').value = row.transcript || '';
      $('#sourcePane').classList.add('concealed');
      $('#dictationText').value = '';
      $('#dictationResult').replaceChildren();
      sessionSeconds = 0;
      localized($('#mediaKind'),isVideo ? I18N.it.mediaVideo : I18N.it.mediaAudio,isVideo ? I18N.en.mediaVideo : I18N.en.mediaAudio);
      media.addEventListener('loadedmetadata',() => {
        duration = Number.isFinite(media.duration) ? media.duration : 0;
        clipA = 0;
        clipB = Math.min(8,duration);
        ['#seek','#startRange','#endRange'].forEach(selector => { $(selector).max = duration || 1; });
        $('#endRange').value = clipB;
        updateTimeline();
      });
      media.addEventListener('timeupdate',handleTimeUpdate);
      media.addEventListener('play',() => { delete media.dataset.paused; updatePlayIcons(); startStudyTimer(); });
      media.addEventListener('pause',() => { media.dataset.paused = 'true'; updatePlayIcons(); stopStudyTimer(); });
      media.addEventListener('error',() => showToast(textFor('Questo formato non può essere riprodotto dal browser.','This format cannot be played by the browser.')));
      closeDrawer();
      switchView('player',true);
      if (focusRequired) setTimeout(openFocusRitual,360);
    }
    function updatePlayIcons() {
      const playing = media && !media.paused;
      $('#playBtn').textContent = playing ? 'Ⅱ' : '▶';
      $('#centerBtn').textContent = playing ? 'Ⅱ' : '▶';
    }
    function togglePlay() {
      if (!media) return showToast(textFor(I18N.it.importFirst,I18N.en.importFirst));
      if (focusRequired) return openFocusRitual();
      if (media.paused) {
        if (media.ended || media.currentTime >= duration-.04 || ((learningModeActive || segmentLoopActive) && (media.currentTime < clipA || media.currentTime >= clipB))) media.currentTime = (learningModeActive || segmentLoopActive) ? clipA : 0;
        media.play().catch(() => {});
      } else {
        media.pause();
      }
    }
    function seekTo(value) {
      if (!media) return;
      media.currentTime = Math.max(0,Math.min(duration,value));
      $('#currentTime').textContent = formatTime(media.currentTime);
    }
    function updateTimeline() {
      const gap = Math.min(.1,duration || .1);
      clipA = Math.max(0,Math.min(clipA,Math.max(0,duration-gap)));
      clipB = Math.max(clipA+gap,Math.min(clipB,duration || gap));
      $('#aTime').textContent = formatTime(clipA,true);
      $('#bTime').textContent = formatTime(clipB,true);
      $('#clipAInput').value = formatTime(clipA,true);
      $('#clipBInput').value = formatTime(clipB,true);
      $('#quickStartTime').textContent = formatTime(clipA,true);
      $('#quickEndTime').textContent = formatTime(clipB,true);
      $('#segmentLength').textContent = Math.max(0,clipB-clipA).toFixed(1) + ' SEC';
      $('#startRange').value = clipA;
      $('#endRange').value = clipB;
      $('#selection').style.left = (duration ? clipA/duration*100 : 0) + '%';
      $('#selection').style.width = (duration ? (clipB-clipA)/duration*100 : 0) + '%';
      $('#mediaDuration').textContent = formatTime(duration);
      $('#totalTime').textContent = formatTime(duration);
    }
    function handleTimeUpdate() {
      if (!media) return;
      const time = media.currentTime;
      $('#currentTime').textContent = formatTime(time);
      $('#seek').value = time;
      $('#gelatoCursor').style.left = (duration ? time/duration*100 : 0) + '%';
      if ((learningModeActive || segmentLoopActive) && clipB > clipA && time >= clipB) {
        loopIndex++;
        repetitions++;
        $('#loopNow').textContent = loopIndex;
        if (loops && loopIndex >= loops) {
          media.pause();
          media.currentTime = clipA;
          loopIndex = 0;
        } else {
          media.currentTime = clipA;
          media.play().catch(() => {});
        }
        renderProgress();
      }
    }
    function nudge(code) {
      if (code === 'a-') clipA -= .1;
      if (code === 'a+') clipA += .1;
      if (code === 'b-') clipB -= .1;
      if (code === 'b+') clipB += .1;
      updateTimeline();
    }
    function markClipBoundary(side) {
      if (!media) return showToast(textFor(I18N.it.importFirst,I18N.en.importFirst));
      const here = Math.max(0,Math.min(duration,media.currentTime));
      if (side === 'a') {
        clipA = Math.min(here,Math.max(0,clipB-.1));
      } else {
        clipB = Math.max(clipA+.1,here);
      }
      updateTimeline();
      showToast(side === 'a' ? textFor('Inizio segnato.','Start marked.') : textFor('Fine segnata.','End marked.'));
    }
    function playSelectedSegment() {
      if (!media) return showToast(textFor(I18N.it.importFirst,I18N.en.importFirst));
      if (clipB <= clipA+.09) return showToast(textFor('Scegli prima un inizio e una fine.','Choose a start and an end first.'));
      segmentLoopActive = true;
      learningModeActive = false;
      $('#learnMode').classList.remove('on');
      $('#freeMode').classList.add('on');
      $('#learningPanel').classList.remove('open');
      $('#playSegmentBtn').classList.add('on');
      loopIndex = 0;
      $('#loopNow').textContent = '0';
      media.currentTime = clipA;
      media.play().catch(() => {});
    }
    function scheduleMaskPanelHide() {
      clearTimeout(maskPanelTimer);
      if (!$('#maskPanel').classList.contains('open')) return;
      maskPanelTimer = setTimeout(() => $('#maskPanel').classList.remove('open'),2000);
    }
    function startStudyTimer() {
      if (timer) return;
      if (!activeLogRow) {
        const isVideo = current && ((current.type && current.type.startsWith('video')) || /\.(mp4|m4v|mov|webm)$/i.test(current.originalName || ''));
        activeLogRow = {id:String(Date.now()) + '-' + String(Math.random()).slice(2,7),date:localDateKey(new Date()),startedAt:Date.now(),type:isVideo ? 'video' : 'audio',mediaId:current ? current.id : '',name:current ? current.name : '',seconds:0};
        studyLog.push(activeLogRow);
      }
      timer = setInterval(() => {
        studySeconds++;
        todaySeconds++;
        sessionSeconds++;
        activeLogRow.seconds++;
        localStorage.setItem('gelato-study',studySeconds);
        localStorage.setItem('gelato-study-day',JSON.stringify({date:todayKey,seconds:todaySeconds}));
        if (activeLogRow.seconds%5 === 0) localStorage.setItem('gelato-study-log-v7',JSON.stringify(studyLog.slice(-600)));
        renderStudy();
      },1000);
    }
    function stopStudyTimer() {
      clearInterval(timer);
      timer = null;
      if (activeLogRow) localStorage.setItem('gelato-study-log-v7',JSON.stringify(studyLog.slice(-600)));
      activeLogRow = null;
    }
    function renderStudy() {
      renderTime();
      renderAlbum(false);
      if (currentView === 'journey') renderJourney();
      if (currentView === 'culture') renderCulture();
      if (currentView === 'progress') renderProgress();
    }

    function setClipFromInput(side,input) {
      const value = parseTimeInput(input.value);
      if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
        input.classList.add('invalid');
        return updateTimeline();
      }
      input.classList.remove('invalid');
      const previousLength = Math.max(.1,clipB-clipA);
      if (side === 'a') {
        clipA = Math.max(0,Math.min(value,Math.max(0,(duration || value+.1)-.1)));
        if (clipA >= clipB) clipB = Math.min(duration || clipA+previousLength,clipA+previousLength);
        if (clipB <= clipA) clipA = Math.max(0,clipB-.1);
      } else {
        clipB = Math.max(.1,Math.min(value,duration || value));
        if (clipB <= clipA) clipA = Math.max(0,clipB-previousLength);
        if (clipB <= clipA) clipB = Math.min(duration || clipA+.1,clipA+.1);
      }
      if (media) media.currentTime = side === 'a' ? clipA : Math.min(media.currentTime,clipB);
      updateTimeline();
    }
    function tidyTranscript(value) {
      return String(value || '')
        .replace(/^WEBVTT[^\n]*\n/i,'')
        .replace(/^\d+\s*$/gm,'')
        .replace(/^\s*\d{1,2}:\d{2}(?::\d{2})?[,.]\d{3}\s*-->.*$/gm,'')
        .replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'')
        .replace(/\n{3,}/g,'\n\n')
        .trim();
    }
    function normalizedWords(value) {
      return String(value || '').normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').toLocaleLowerCase('it')
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9àèéìòù'’]+/gi,' ').trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
    }
    function checkDictation() {
      const source = normalizedWords($('#sourceText').value);
      const answer = normalizedWords($('#dictationText').value);
      const result = $('#dictationResult');
      result.replaceChildren();
      if (!source.length) {
        localized(result,'Aggiungi prima il testo originale.','Add the source text first.');
        return;
      }
      const width = Math.max(source.length,answer.length,1);
      let same = 0;
      for (let index=0;index<Math.min(source.length,answer.length);index++) if (source[index] === answer[index]) same++;
      const score = Math.max(0,Math.round(same/width*100));
      const strong = document.createElement('strong');
      strong.textContent = score + '%';
      const copy = document.createElement('span');
      localized(copy,score >= 85 ? ' Molto vicino. Riascolta soltanto i piccoli vuoti.' : ' Confronta con calma: ogni parola trovata conta.',score >= 85 ? ' Very close. Replay only the small gaps.' : ' Compare calmly: every word you found counts.');
      result.append(strong,copy);
    }
    let focusTimerId = null;
    let focusCountdownId = null;
    let focusRemaining = 180;
    function closeFocusRitual(force) {
      if (focusRequired && !force) {
        showToast(textFor('Scrivi almeno una riga prima di iniziare.','Write at least one line before you begin.'));
        $('#mindText').focus();
        return;
      }
      clearInterval(focusTimerId);
      clearInterval(focusCountdownId);
      focusTimerId = null;
      focusCountdownId = null;
      $('#mindText').value = '';
      $('#focusRitual').classList.remove('open');
      $('#focusRitual').classList.remove('required');
      $('#focusWrite').style.display = '';
      $('#focusRelease').classList.remove('open');
      $('#focusCountdown').classList.remove('open');
      $('#particleField').replaceChildren();
    }
    function openFocusRitual() {
      if (!current) return showToast(textFor(I18N.it.importFirst,I18N.en.importFirst));
      if (media && !media.paused) media.pause();
      clearInterval(focusTimerId);
      clearInterval(focusCountdownId);
      focusRemaining = 180;
      $('#focusTimer').textContent = '03:00';
      $('#mindText').value = '';
      $('#focusWrite').style.display = '';
      $('#focusRelease').classList.remove('open');
      $('#focusCountdown').classList.remove('open');
      $('#particleField').replaceChildren();
      $('#focusRitual').classList.add('open');
      $('#focusRitual').classList.toggle('required',focusRequired);
      localized($('#focusRequirement'),focusRequired ? 'SCRIVI ALMENO UNA RIGA · QUESTO PASSAGGIO PROTEGGE IL TUO TEMPO' : 'SCRIVI LIBERAMENTE · QUESTO TESTO NON VIENE SALVATO',focusRequired ? 'WRITE AT LEAST ONE LINE · THIS STEP PROTECTS YOUR STUDY TIME' : 'WRITE FREELY · THIS TEXT IS NOT SAVED');
      setTimeout(() => $('#mindText').focus(),80);
      focusTimerId = setInterval(() => {
        focusRemaining = Math.max(0,focusRemaining-1);
        $('#focusTimer').textContent = formatTime(focusRemaining);
        if (!focusRemaining) finishFocusRitual();
      },1000);
    }
    function finishFocusRitual() {
      if (!$('#focusRitual').classList.contains('open') || $('#focusRelease').classList.contains('open')) return;
      if (!$('#mindText').value.trim()) {
        showToast(textFor('Prima lascia qui almeno una riga.','First, leave at least one line here.'));
        $('#mindText').focus();
        return;
      }
      clearInterval(focusTimerId);
      focusTimerId = null;
      $('#mindText').value = '';
      $('#focusWrite').style.display = 'none';
      $('#focusRelease').classList.add('open');
      localized($('#releaseLine'),'Fai spazio. Respira. Ora comincia.','Make space. Breathe. Begin.');
      const field = $('#particleField');
      field.replaceChildren();
      for (let index=0;index<54;index++) {
        const particle = document.createElement('i');
        particle.className = 'thought-particle';
        const angle = Math.PI*2*index/54 + (index%5)*.13;
        const distance = 120+(index%9)*34;
        particle.style.setProperty('--px',Math.cos(angle)*distance + 'px');
        particle.style.setProperty('--py',Math.sin(angle)*distance + 'px');
        particle.style.animationDelay = (index%8)*.035 + 's';
        field.append(particle);
      }
    }
    function beginFocusCountdown() {
      clearInterval(focusCountdownId);
      $('#focusRelease').classList.remove('open');
      $('#focusCountdown').classList.add('open');
      let number = 3;
      $('#countdownNumber').textContent = String(number);
      focusCountdownId = setInterval(() => {
        number--;
        if (number > 0) {
          $('#countdownNumber').textContent = String(number);
          $('#countdownNumber').style.animation = 'none';
          requestAnimationFrame(() => { $('#countdownNumber').style.animation = ''; });
          return;
        }
        clearInterval(focusCountdownId);
        focusCountdownId = null;
        focusRequired = false;
        closeFocusRitual(true);
        if (media) {
          if (learningModeActive && (media.currentTime < clipA || media.currentTime >= clipB)) media.currentTime = clipA;
          media.play().catch(() => $('#playBtn').focus());
        }
      },1000);
    }

    function renderLearning() {
      $('#stepDots').innerHTML = learningSteps.map((step,index) => '<i class="' + (index <= learningStep ? 'on' : '') + '"></i>').join('');
      const step = learningSteps[learningStep];
      localized($('#stepTitle'),step.it,step.en);
      const input = $('#learningInput');
      input.replaceChildren();
      if (learningStep === 2) {
        const original = document.createElement('input');
        const meaning = document.createElement('input');
        original.placeholder = textFor('Testo originale (opzionale)','Original text (optional)');
        meaning.placeholder = textFor('Significato o nota (opzionale)','Meaning or note (optional)');
        input.append(original,meaning);
      } else if (learningStep === 4) {
        const memory = document.createElement('input');
        memory.placeholder = textFor('Scrivi la frase a memoria…','Write the phrase from memory…');
        input.append(memory);
      }
      localized($('#nextStep'),learningStep === 5 ? I18N.it.complete : I18N.it.next,learningStep === 5 ? I18N.en.complete : I18N.en.next);
      renderProgress();
    }
    function recordBounds() {
      const now = new Date();
      const start = new Date(now);start.setHours(0,0,0,0);
      const end = new Date(now);end.setHours(23,59,59,999);
      if (recordRange === 'day') return {start:start,end:end,hourly:true};
      if (recordRange === 'week') { start.setDate(start.getDate()-6); return {start:start,end:end}; }
      if (recordRange === 'month') { start.setDate(1); return {start:start,end:end}; }
      const from = $('#recordStartDate').value ? new Date($('#recordStartDate').value + 'T00:00:00') : start;
      const to = $('#recordEndDate').value ? new Date($('#recordEndDate').value + 'T23:59:59') : end;
      return {start:from,end:to};
    }
    function shortDate(date) {
      return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(lang === 'en' ? 'en-GB' : 'it-IT',{day:'2-digit',month:'short'}).format(date).replace('.','');
    }
    function renderProgress() {
      if (!$('#recordChart')) return;
      const bounds = recordBounds();
      const startKey = localDateKey(bounds.start);
      const endKey = localDateKey(bounds.end);
      const rows = studyLog.filter(row => (recordMediaFilter === 'all' || row.type === recordMediaFilter) && row.date >= startKey && row.date <= endKey);
      if (!studyLog.length && studySeconds > 0 && recordMediaFilter === 'all' && todayKey >= startKey && todayKey <= endKey) rows.push({id:'legacy',date:todayKey,startedAt:Date.now(),type:'legacy',seconds:studySeconds});
      const buckets = [];
      if (bounds.hourly) {
        for (let hour=0;hour<24;hour+=4) buckets.push({key:String(hour),label:String(hour).padStart(2,'0') + ':00',seconds:0});
        rows.forEach(row => { const hour = new Date(row.startedAt || Date.now()).getHours(); buckets[Math.min(5,Math.floor(hour/4))].seconds += Number(row.seconds || 0); });
      } else {
        const cursor = new Date(bounds.start);cursor.setHours(0,0,0,0);
        let guard = 0;
        while (cursor <= bounds.end && guard < 370) {
          buckets.push({key:localDateKey(cursor),label:shortDate(cursor),seconds:0});
          cursor.setDate(cursor.getDate()+1);guard++;
        }
        const byKey = new Map(buckets.map(bucket => [bucket.key,bucket]));
        rows.forEach(row => { if (byKey.has(row.date)) byKey.get(row.date).seconds += Number(row.seconds || 0); });
      }
      const total = rows.reduce((sum,row) => sum+Number(row.seconds || 0),0);
      const latest = rows.slice().sort((a,b) => Number(b.startedAt || 0)-Number(a.startedAt || 0))[0];
      const resume = $('#recordResume');
      resume.classList.toggle('available',Boolean(latest && latest.mediaId));
      localized($('#recordResumeKind'),latest ? (latest.type === 'video' ? 'ULTIMO FILM' : 'ULTIMO ASCOLTO') : 'NESSUN ASCOLTO',latest ? (latest.type === 'video' ? 'LAST FILM' : 'LAST LISTENING') : 'NO LISTENING');
      $('#recordResumeTitle').textContent = latest ? (latest.name || textFor('Senza titolo','Untitled')).replace(/\.[^/.]+$/,'') : textFor('Il prossimo viaggio','Your next journey');
      $('#recordResumeMeta').textContent = latest ? shortDate(new Date(latest.startedAt || Date.now())) + ' · ' + formatLong(latest.seconds || 0) : textFor('Importa un file per iniziare','Import a file to begin');
      resume.onclick = async () => {
        if (!latest || !latest.mediaId) return;
        const saved = (await getAllMedia()).find(item => item.id === latest.mediaId);
        if (saved) openMedia(saved,false); else showToast(textFor('Questo file non è più nella libreria locale.','This file is no longer in the local library.'));
      };
      $('#recordTotal').textContent = formatLong(total);
      $('#recordSessions').textContent = String(rows.length);
      $('#recordDays').textContent = String(new Set(rows.filter(row => row.seconds > 0).map(row => row.date)).size);
      const rangeIt = bounds.hourly ? 'OGGI · ' + shortDate(bounds.start) : shortDate(bounds.start) + ' — ' + shortDate(bounds.end);
      const rangeEn = bounds.hourly ? 'TODAY · ' + shortDate(bounds.start) : shortDate(bounds.start) + ' — ' + shortDate(bounds.end);
      localized($('#recordRangeLabel'),rangeIt,rangeEn);

      const videoSeconds = rows.filter(row => row.type === 'video').reduce((sum,row) => sum+Number(row.seconds || 0),0);
      const audioSeconds = rows.filter(row => row.type === 'audio').reduce((sum,row) => sum+Number(row.seconds || 0),0);
      const known = videoSeconds+audioSeconds;
      const videoShare = known ? Math.round(videoSeconds/known*100) : 0;
      $('#balanceText').textContent = known ? 'V ' + videoShare + '%' : '—';
      $('#balanceRing').style.background = known ? 'conic-gradient(var(--scene-accent) 0 ' + videoShare + '%,var(--scene-accent-2) ' + videoShare + '% 100%)' : 'transparent';
      localized($('#balanceNote'),known ? 'Video ' + videoShare + '% · Audio ' + (100-videoShare) + '%' : 'Ancora nessun confronto',known ? 'Video ' + videoShare + '% · Audio ' + (100-videoShare) + '%' : 'No comparison yet');

      const line = $('#recordLine');
      const shadow = $('#recordLineShadow');
      const area = $('#recordArea');
      const dots = $('#recordDots');
      const axis = $('#recordAxis');
      dots.replaceChildren();axis.replaceChildren();
      const max = Math.max(60,...buckets.map(bucket => bucket.seconds));
      const span = Math.max(1,buckets.length-1);
      const points = buckets.map((bucket,index) => ({x:64+896*(index/span),y:340-270*(bucket.seconds/max),value:bucket.seconds,label:bucket.label}));
      let path = '';
      points.forEach((point,index) => {
        if (!index) path = 'M' + point.x.toFixed(1) + ' ' + point.y.toFixed(1);
        else {
          const previous = points[index-1];
          const middle = (previous.x+point.x)/2;
          path += ' C' + middle.toFixed(1) + ' ' + previous.y.toFixed(1) + ' ' + middle.toFixed(1) + ' ' + point.y.toFixed(1) + ' ' + point.x.toFixed(1) + ' ' + point.y.toFixed(1);
        }
      });
      line.setAttribute('d',total ? path : '');shadow.setAttribute('d',total ? path : '');
      area.setAttribute('d',total && points.length ? path + ' L' + points[points.length-1].x + ' 365 L' + points[0].x + ' 365 Z' : '');
      const namespace = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
      points.forEach((point,index) => {
        if (point.value > 0) {
          const halo = document.createElementNS(namespace,'circle');halo.setAttribute('class','record-dot-halo');halo.setAttribute('cx',point.x);halo.setAttribute('cy',point.y);halo.setAttribute('r','8');
          const dot = document.createElementNS(namespace,'circle');dot.setAttribute('class','record-dot');dot.setAttribute('cx',point.x);dot.setAttribute('cy',point.y);dot.setAttribute('r','4');
          const title = document.createElementNS(namespace,'title');title.textContent = point.label + ' · ' + formatLong(point.value);dot.append(title);dots.append(halo,dot);
        }
        const step = Math.max(1,Math.ceil(points.length/7));
        if (index%step === 0 || index === points.length-1) { const text = document.createElementNS(namespace,'text');text.setAttribute('x',point.x);text.setAttribute('y','389');text.setAttribute('text-anchor','middle');text.textContent = point.label;axis.append(text); }
      });
      $('#recordEmpty').classList.toggle('open',!total);
    }

    function setArc(el,radius,fraction) {
      const circumference = 2*Math.PI*radius;
      el.style.strokeDasharray = circumference;
      el.style.strokeDashoffset = circumference*(1-Math.max(0,Math.min(1,fraction)));
    }
    function dayPart() {
      const hour = basisParts().hour;
      if (hour < 5) return {it:'notte quieta',en:'quiet night'};
      if (hour < 12) return {it:'mattina chiara',en:'clear morning'};
      if (hour < 18) return {it:'pomeriggio lento',en:'slow afternoon'};
      return {it:'sera dorata',en:'golden evening'};
    }
    function timeQuote() {
      const hour = basisParts().hour;
      if (hour < 5) return {it:'Anche una città addormentata conserva una voce.',en:'Even a sleeping city keeps a voice.'};
      if (hour < 12) return {it:'Una frase alla volta, come luce sulle persiane.',en:'One phrase at a time, like light on the shutters.'};
      if (hour < 18) return {it:'Il tempo ascoltato non corre: si deposita.',en:'Listening time does not rush: it settles.'};
      return {it:'La sera raccoglie le parole che hai ripetuto.',en:'Evening gathers the words you repeated.'};
    }
    function renderTime() {
      const remainder = studySeconds%600 === 0 ? 600 : 600-studySeconds%600;
      $('#studyTime').textContent = formatTime(studySeconds);
      $('#todayTime').textContent = formatTime(todaySeconds);
      $('#sessionTime').textContent = formatTime(sessionSeconds);
      $('#stampCountdown').textContent = formatTime(remainder);
      const part = dayPart();
      const quote = timeQuote();
      localized($('#timeOfDay'),part.it,part.en);
      localized($('#timeQuote'),quote.it,quote.en);
      const collected = unlockedStamps.length;
      const choices = availableStampChoices();
      const itReward = 'Hai raccolto ' + collected + ' ' + (collected === 1 ? 'francobollo' : 'francobolli') + (choices ? ' e hai ' + choices + ' scelta pronta.' : '. Ancora ' + formatLong(remainder) + ' per scegliere un nuovo ricordo.');
      const enReward = 'You have collected ' + collected + ' ' + (collected === 1 ? 'stamp' : 'stamps') + (choices ? ' and have ' + choices + ' choice ready.' : '. In ' + formatLong(remainder) + ', you can choose a new memory.');
      localized($('#timeReward'),itReward,enReward);
      setArc($('#todayArc'),174,(todaySeconds%(60*60))/(60*60));
      setArc($('#sessionArc'),146,(sessionSeconds%(30*60))/(30*60));
      setArc($('#rewardArc'),118,(studySeconds%600)/600);
      renderWindowRewards();
    }
    function renderWindowRewards() {
      const row = $('#windowRow');
      if (!row) return;
      const cities = [
        ['A','Roma','FINESTRA SERLIANA','CLASSICAL ARCH'],
        ['B','Venezia','BIFORA GOTICA','GOTHIC BIFORA'],
        ['C','Firenze','BIFORA RINASCIMENTALE','RENAISSANCE BIFORA'],
        ['D','Bologna','FINESTRA CON SCURI','WOODEN SHUTTERS'],
        ['E','Sicilia','FINESTRA BAROCCA','BAROQUE BALCONY']
      ];
      const completed = Math.floor(studySeconds/1800);
      const floor = completed && completed%5 === 0 ? completed/5 : Math.floor(completed/5)+1;
      const lit = completed === 0 ? 0 : (completed%5 === 0 ? 5 : completed%5);
      row.replaceChildren();
      cities.forEach((city,index) => {
        const window = document.createElement('article');
        window.className = 'study-window w' + (index+1) + (index < lit ? ' unlocked' : '');
        const state = index < lit ? textFor('SBLOCCATA · ILLUMINATA','UNLOCKED · LIT') : (index+1)*30 + ' MIN';
        window.innerHTML = '<span class="window-kicker">' + city[0] + ' · ' + city[1].toUpperCase() + '</span><b>' + city[1] + '</b><em>' + textFor(city[2],city[3]) + '</em><div class="window-light" aria-hidden="true"></div><small>' + state + '</small>';
        row.append(window);
      });
      localized($('#windowFloor'),'PIANO ' + floor + ' · PALAZZO DEL TEMPO','FLOOR ' + floor + ' · PALACE OF TIME');
      $('#palazzoReveal').classList.toggle('open',completed >= 5);
    }

    function applyScene(index,scroll,fromClock) {
      sceneIndex = Math.max(0,Math.min(scenes.length-1,Number(index) || 0));
      if (!fromClock) {
        timeBasis = 'manual';
        localStorage.setItem('gelato-time-basis-v7',timeBasis);
      }
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-scene-v7',String(sceneIndex));
      const scene = scenes[sceneIndex];
      applySceneTheme();
      localized($('#sceneTitle'),scene.city + ' · ' + scene.it,scene.city + ' · ' + scene.en);
      $$('.scene-card').forEach((card,cardIndex) => card.classList.toggle('on',cardIndex === sceneIndex));
      $$('#timeBasisButtons button').forEach(button => button.classList.toggle('on',button.dataset.timeBasis === selectedClockBasis));
      $('#customSceneTime').classList.toggle('open',selectedClockBasis === 'custom');
      if (scroll !== false) {
        const active = $('.scene-card[data-scene="' + sceneIndex + '"]');
        if (active) active.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest',inline:'center'});
      }
      positionPocketWatch(basisParts());
      renderSceneJourneyFooter();
    }
    function renderScenes() {
      const track = $('#sceneTrack');
      track.replaceChildren();
      scenes.forEach((scene,index) => {
        const card = document.createElement('button');
        card.type = 'button';
        card.className = 'scene-card ' + (index === sceneIndex ? 'on' : '');
        card.dataset.scene = index;
        card.style.setProperty('--i',index);
        const image = document.createElement('img');
        image.src = scene.img;
        image.alt = scene.city;
        image.loading = 'lazy';
        const time = document.createElement('small');
        time.textContent = scene.time;
        const city = document.createElement('b');
        city.textContent = scene.city;
        const period = document.createElement('small');
        localized(period,scene.it,scene.en);
        card.append(image,time,city,period);
        card.onclick = () => {
          customSceneImage = '';
          localStorage.removeItem('gelato-custom-wallpaper-v9');
          applyScene(index,true,false);
        };
        track.append(card);
      });
      applyScene(sceneIndex,false,timeBasis !== 'manual');
    }
    function renderSceneJourneyFooter() {
      const count = $('#sceneJourneyCount');
      const dots = $('#sceneJourneyDots');
      const nextName = $('#sceneNextName');
      const nextThumb = $('#sceneNextThumb');
      if (!count || !dots || !nextName || !nextThumb) return;
      const nextIndex = (sceneIndex + 1) % scenes.length;
      const nextScene = scenes[nextIndex];
      count.textContent = (sceneIndex + 1) + ' / ' + scenes.length + ' ' + textFor('SCENARI','SCENES');
      dots.replaceChildren();
      scenes.forEach((scene,index) => {
        const dot = document.createElement('i');
        if (index <= sceneIndex) dot.classList.add('done');
        dots.append(dot);
      });
      nextName.textContent = String(nextIndex + 1).padStart(2,'0') + ' · ' + nextScene.city + ' · ' + textFor(nextScene.it,nextScene.en);
      nextThumb.src = nextScene.img;
      nextThumb.alt = nextScene.city;
      $$('#sceneMiniWindows i').forEach((window,index) => window.classList.toggle('lit',index < Math.min(5,Math.floor(studySeconds/1800))));
    }
    function openSceneModePrompt(basis) {
      pendingTimeBasis = basis;
      const names = {'Europe/Rome':['l’ora italiana','Italian time'],'Asia/Shanghai':['l’ora di Pechino','Beijing time'],'Asia/Bangkok':['l’ora di Chiang Mai','Chiang Mai time'],custom:['l’ora scelta da te','your chosen time']};
      const name = names[basis] || names['Europe/Rome'];
      localized($('#sceneModeTitle'),'Come deve vivere lo sfondo?','How should the background move?');
      localized($('#sceneModeCopy'),'Hai scelto ' + name[0] + '. Vuoi far cambiare automaticamente il paesaggio oppure tenere la scena che hai scelto a mano?','You chose ' + name[1] + '. Should the landscape change automatically, or keep the scene you selected by hand?');
      localized($('#sceneKeepChoice'),'TIENI QUESTA SCENA','KEEP THIS SCENE');
      localized($('#sceneFollowChoice'),'SEGUI QUEST’ORA','FOLLOW THIS CLOCK');
      $('#sceneModeModal').classList.add('open');
    }
    function positionPocketWatch(parts) {
      const watch = $('#pocketWatch');
      const gallery = $('#sceneGallery');
      const active = $('.scene-card[data-scene="' + sceneIndex + '"]');
      if (!watch || !gallery || !active) return;
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        const galleryRect = gallery.getBoundingClientRect();
        const cardRect = active.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (!galleryRect.width || !cardRect.width) return;
        const left = cardRect.left-galleryRect.left+cardRect.width*.72;
        const top = cardRect.top-galleryRect.top+cardRect.height*.76;
        watch.style.left = Math.max(42,Math.min(galleryRect.width-42,left)) + 'px';
        watch.style.top = Math.max(42,Math.min(galleryRect.height-42,top)) + 'px';
      });
    }
    function updateClock() {
      const now = new Date();
      const parts = basisParts();
      const hours = parts.hour%12;
      const minutes = parts.minute;
      const rome = zonedParts('Europe/Rome',now);
      const local = {hour:now.getHours(),minute:now.getMinutes()};
      const two = value => String(value).padStart(2,'0');
      $('#watchHour').style.transform = 'rotate(' + (hours*30+minutes*.5) + 'deg)';
      $('#watchMinute').style.transform = 'rotate(' + (minutes*6) + 'deg)';
      $('#sceneTime').textContent = two(parts.hour) + ':' + two(minutes);
      $('#romeTime').textContent = two(rome.hour) + ':' + two(rome.minute);
      $('#localTime').textContent = two(local.hour) + ':' + two(local.minute);
      updateHomeGreeting(rome.hour,rome.minute);
      positionPocketWatch(parts);
      if (timeBasis !== 'manual') {
        const automatic = sceneForHour(parts.hour);
        if (automatic !== sceneIndex) applyScene(automatic,false,true);
      }
      if (currentView === 'culture') renderGreeting();
    }
    function updateHomeGreeting(hour,minute) {
      const greeting = hour < 5 ? ['Buonanotte','Una piccola pausa nella notte'] : hour < 12 ? ['Buongiorno','Cominciamo con calma'] : hour < 18 ? ['Buon pomeriggio','Una frase alla volta'] : hour < 23 ? ['Buonasera','Lascia fuori il rumore'] : ['Buonanotte','Ancora un ascolto, poi riposo'];
      localized($('#homeGreeting'),greeting[0],hour < 5 || hour >= 23 ? 'Good night' : hour < 12 ? 'Good morning' : hour < 18 ? 'Good afternoon' : 'Good evening');
      const two = value => String(value).padStart(2,'0');
      localized($('#homeGreetingTime'),two(hour) + ':' + two(minute) + ' · ' + greeting[1],two(hour) + ':' + two(minute) + ' · Rome time');
    }

    const curatedStamps = [
      {year:'1863',title:'Vittorio Emanuele II',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/Vittorio_Emanuele_II_-_1863.jpg',it:'Questo francobollo mostra Vittorio Emanuele II, il primo re d’Italia. Fu emesso nel 1863 e valeva cinque centesimi.',en:'This stamp shows Victor Emmanuel II, the first king of Italy. It was issued in 1863 and was worth five cents.'},
      {year:'1901',title:'Aquila di Savoia',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1901_MiNr0075_pm_B002.jpg',it:'Un’aquila appare dentro una cornice di fiori. Il francobollo appartiene alla prima serie del regno di Vittorio Emanuele III.',en:'An eagle appears inside a floral frame. The stamp belongs to the first series from the reign of Victor Emmanuel III.'},
      {year:'1930',title:'Italia turrita',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1930_MiNr0331_pm_B002.jpg',it:'La figura femminile rappresenta l’Italia. La corona con le torri è un simbolo antico del Paese.',en:'The female figure represents Italy. Her crown with towers is an old symbol of the country.'},
      {year:'1931',title:'Amerigo Vespucci',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1931_MiNr0370_pm_B002.jpg',it:'Qui vediamo la nave Amerigo Vespucci. Il francobollo ricorda i cinquant’anni dell’Accademia Navale di Livorno.',en:'Here we see the Amerigo Vespucci ship. The stamp marks fifty years of the Naval Academy in Livorno.'},
      {year:'1932',title:'Garibaldi e Nino Bixio',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1932_MiNr0393_pm_B002.jpg',it:'Il francobollo ricorda Giuseppe Garibaldi e Nino Bixio e una parte della storia dell’unità d’Italia.',en:'The stamp remembers Giuseppe Garibaldi and Nino Bixio and part of the story of Italian unification.'},
      {year:'1932',title:'Ugo Foscolo',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/Serie_società_pro-DanteAlighieri_-_francobolli_del_Regno_d%27Italia_-_1932_-_Ugo_foscolo.jpg',it:'Ugo Foscolo era un poeta e scrittore italiano. Scriveva di memoria, patria e vita umana.',en:'Ugo Foscolo was an Italian poet and writer. He wrote about memory, homeland and human life.'},
      {year:'1935',title:'Leonardo da Vinci',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1935_MiNr0531_pm_B002.jpg',it:'Leonardo appare sotto un cielo con aeroplani. L’immagine collega le sue idee sul volo alla tecnologia moderna.',en:'Leonardo appears below a sky with aeroplanes. The image links his ideas about flight with modern technology.'},
      {year:'1937',title:'Gaspare Spontini',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1937_MiNr0591_pm_B002.jpg',it:'Gaspare Spontini era un compositore italiano. Questo francobollo appartiene a una serie dedicata a italiani famosi.',en:'Gaspare Spontini was an Italian composer. This stamp belongs to a series about famous Italians.'},
      {year:'1945',title:'Dante Alighieri',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1945_MiNr0721_mt_B002a.jpg',it:'Dante Alighieri è uno dei poeti italiani più famosi. La sua opera ha avuto un ruolo importante nella lingua italiana.',en:'Dante Alighieri is one of Italy’s most famous poets. His work played an important role in the Italian language.'},
      {year:'1945',title:'Galileo Galilei',img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/ITA_1945_MiNr0722_mt_B002.jpg',it:'Galileo osservava il cielo e studiava la natura. Il francobollo lo presenta come uno dei grandi italiani.',en:'Galileo observed the sky and studied nature. The stamp presents him as one of the great Italians.'}
    ];
    const TOTAL_STAMPS = 110;
    const stampShapes = ['portrait','landscape','square','tall','portrait','landscape','square','portrait','tall'];
    const stamps = curatedStamps.slice();
    while (stamps.length < TOTAL_STAMPS) {
      const number = stamps.length+1;
      stamps.push({
        year:'—',
        title:'Archivio ' + String(number).padStart(3,'0'),
        img:null,
        it:I18N.it.stampGeneric,
        en:I18N.en.stampGeneric,
        loading:true
      });
    }
    let unlockedStamps = [];
    try { unlockedStamps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gelato-unlocked-stamps-v7') || '[]'); } catch (error) { unlockedStamps = []; }
    unlockedStamps = Array.from(new Set(unlockedStamps.map(Number).filter(index => Number.isInteger(index) && index >= 0 && index < TOTAL_STAMPS)));
    let currentStampIndex = 0;
    let wallPreviewTimer = null;
    const commonsCategories = [
      'Category:Stamps_of_the_Kingdom_of_Italy',
      'Category:Overprints_on_stamps_of_Italy',
      'Category:Postage_due_stamps_of_Italy',
      'Category:Express_and_special_delivery_stamps_of_Italy',
      'Category:Airmail_stamps_of_Italy',
      'Category:Parcel_stamps_of_Italy'
    ];
    function stampPlaceholder(index) {
      const hue = [94,35,185,12][index%4];
      const svg =
        '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="360" height="430" viewBox="0 0 360 430">' +
        '<rect width="360" height="430" fill="hsl(' + hue + ' 18% 76%)"/>' +
        '<rect x="22" y="22" width="316" height="386" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="hsl(' + hue + ' 23% 35%)" stroke-width="3"/>' +
        '<ellipse cx="180" cy="178" rx="82" ry="104" fill="none" stroke="hsl(' + hue + ' 22% 42%)" stroke-width="4"/>' +
        '<path d="M94 302h172M112 324h136" stroke="hsl(' + hue + ' 22% 42%)" stroke-width="3"/>' +
        '<text x="180" y="365" text-anchor="middle" font-family="serif" font-size="24" fill="hsl(' + hue + ' 25% 32%)">ITALIA · ' +
        String(index+1).padStart(3,'0') + '</text></svg>';
      return 'data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,' + encodeURIComponent(svg);
    }
    async function loadStampArchive() {
      const seen = new Set();
      curatedStamps.forEach(stamp => seen.add(decodeURIComponent(stamp.img).toLowerCase()));
      const titles = [];
      for (const category of commonsCategories) {
        if (titles.length >= 100) break;
        try {
          const url = new URL('https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php');
          url.search = new URLSearchParams({
            action:'query',list:'categorymembers',cmtitle:category,cmtype:'file',
            cmlimit:'100',format:'json',origin:'*'
          }).toString();
          const data = await fetch(url).then(response => response.ok ? response.json() : Promise.reject(new Error('archive')));
          const members = data.query && data.query.categorymembers ? data.query.categorymembers : [];
          for (const item of members) {
            const file = item.title.replace(/^File:/,'');
            if (!/\.(jpe?g|png|webp|tiff?)$/i.test(file)) continue;
            const fileYear = file.match(/\b(18\d{2}|19\d{2}|20\d{2})\b/);
            if (!fileYear || Number(fileYear[0]) > 1945) continue;
            const key = file.toLowerCase();
            if (seen.has(key) || /cover|postcard|forger|booklet/i.test(file)) continue;
            seen.add(key);
            titles.push({file:file,category:category});
            if (titles.length >= 100) break;
          }
        } catch (error) {}
      }
      titles.slice(0,100).forEach((entry,itemIndex) => {
        const index = 10+itemIndex;
        if (index >= TOTAL_STAMPS) return;
        const clean = entry.file
          .replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'')
          .replace(/[_-]+/g,' ')
          .replace(/\b(?:MiNr|B00\d|pm|mt)\b/gi,' ')
          .replace(/\s+/g,' ')
          .trim();
        const yearMatch = clean.match(/\b(18|19|20)\d{2}\b/);
        stamps[index] = {
          year:yearMatch ? yearMatch[0] : '—',
          title:clean.slice(0,70) || 'Archivio ' + String(index+1),
          img:'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:Redirect/file/' + encodeURIComponent(entry.file).replace(/%2F/g,'/'),
          it:I18N.it.stampGeneric,
          en:I18N.en.stampGeneric,
          source:entry.category.replace('Category:','').replace(/_/g,' '),
          loading:false
        };
      });
      renderAlbum(true);
    }
    function earnedStampChoices() {
      return Math.min(TOTAL_STAMPS,Math.floor(studySeconds/600));
    }
    function availableStampChoices() {
      return Math.max(0,earnedStampChoices()-unlockedStamps.length);
    }
    function stampSize(index) {
      const shape = stampShapes[index%stampShapes.length];
      if (shape === 'landscape') return [82,58];
      if (shape === 'square') return [66,66];
      if (shape === 'tall') return [54,82];
      return [61,78];
    }
    function stampButton(stamp,index) {
      const slot = document.createElement('article');
      slot.className = 'stamp-slot';
      const unlocked = unlockedStamps.includes(index);
      const size = stampSize(index);
      const shape = stampShapes[index%stampShapes.length];
      const position = index%10;
      const band = Math.floor(index/10);
      const layout = [
        {x:50,y:246,w:164,h:188,z:92,scale:1.05,blur:0,opacity:1,rot:-1},
        {x:12,y:220,w:108,h:132,z:34,scale:1,blur:.08,opacity:.88,rot:-4},
        {x:87,y:210,w:118,h:140,z:42,scale:1.02,blur:0,opacity:.9,rot:4},
        {x:25,y:72,w:76,h:96,z:-42,scale:.86,blur:.7,opacity:.62,rot:-7},
        {x:51,y:64,w:96,h:110,z:-30,scale:.92,blur:.42,opacity:.72,rot:6},
        {x:79,y:82,w:72,h:90,z:-54,scale:.8,blur:.82,opacity:.57,rot:8},
        {x:26,y:404,w:92,h:110,z:-10,scale:.94,blur:.26,opacity:.76,rot:5},
        {x:64,y:392,w:104,h:126,z:22,scale:.99,blur:.1,opacity:.84,rot:-5},
        {x:8,y:426,w:70,h:88,z:-50,scale:.82,blur:.74,opacity:.58,rot:7},
        {x:92,y:414,w:78,h:96,z:-36,scale:.87,blur:.52,opacity:.66,rot:-6}
      ][position];
      const mirrored = band%2 === 1;
      if (position === 0) {
        slot.classList.add('focal-stamp');
        slot.dataset.callout = unlocked ? textFor('TOCCA IL FRANCOBOLLO','TOUCH THE STAMP') : textFor('RICORDO VELATO','VEILED MEMORY');
      }
      /* Each group of ten is one photographic room. The coordinates stay
         deliberately irregular, but the focal stamp never becomes oversized. */
      const wallX = mirrored ? 100-layout.x : layout.x;
      const wallY = 32 + band * 520 + layout.y;
      const shapeRatio = size[0] / size[1];
      const wallH = layout.h;
      const wallW = Math.max(layout.w*.78,Math.min(layout.w*1.24,wallH*shapeRatio));
      slot.style.setProperty('--wall-x',wallX + '%');
      slot.style.setProperty('--wall-y',wallY + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--wall-w',wallW + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--wall-h',wallH + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--wall-w-mobile',Math.round(wallW*.78) + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--wall-h-mobile',Math.round(wallH*.78) + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--sw',size[0] + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--sh',size[1] + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--dx',(((index*37)%13)-6) + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--dy',(((index*23)%15)-7) + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--rot',(mirrored ? -layout.rot : layout.rot) + 'deg');
      slot.style.setProperty('--z',layout.z + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--depth-scale',layout.scale);
      slot.style.setProperty('--depth-blur',layout.blur + 'px');
      slot.style.setProperty('--depth-opacity',layout.opacity);
      slot.style.setProperty('--float',((index*7)%4) + 's');
      slot.style.setProperty('--delay',((index*11)%7) + 's');
      const button = document.createElement('button');
      button.type = 'button';
      button.className = 'stamp-card ' + stampShapes[index%stampShapes.length] + ' ' + (unlocked ? '' : 'locked') + ' ' + (stamp.loading ? 'loading' : '');
      button.dataset.lock = '';
      button.dataset.stampIndex = String(index);
      const image = document.createElement('img');
      image.src = stamp.img || stampPlaceholder(index);
      image.alt = stamp.title;
      image.loading = 'lazy';
      image.onerror = () => {
        image.onerror = null;
        image.src = stampPlaceholder(index);
      };
      const caption = document.createElement('span');
      caption.className = 'stamp-caption';
      caption.textContent = stamp.year + ' · ' + stamp.title;
      button.append(image);
      button.onclick = () => {
        if (!unlocked) {
          if (availableStampChoices()) openStampChoices();
          else {
            const remaining = studySeconds%600 === 0 ? 600 : 600-studySeconds%600;
            showToast(textFor('Ascolta ancora ' + formatLong(remaining) + ' per scegliere un nuovo ricordo.','Listen for ' + formatLong(remaining) + ' more to choose a new memory.'));
          }
          return;
        }
        replayStampColour(button);
        openStampPreview(index);
      };
      slot.append(button,caption);
      return slot;
    }
    function replayStampColour(button) {
      if (!button) return;
      ['color-reveal','color-live','stamp-st1','stamp-st2','stamp-st3'].forEach(name => button.classList.remove(name));
      void button.offsetWidth;
      button.classList.add('color-reveal');
      (button._colourTimers || []).forEach(clearTimeout);
      button._colourTimers = [
        setTimeout(() => button.classList.add('stamp-st1'),260),
        setTimeout(() => button.classList.add('stamp-st2'),640),
        setTimeout(() => button.classList.add('stamp-st3'),1020),
        setTimeout(() => ['color-reveal','color-live','stamp-st1','stamp-st2','stamp-st3'].forEach(name => button.classList.remove(name)),1600)
      ];
    }
    const stampWallStyle = 'darkroom';
    function renderAlbum(force) {
      const signature = unlockedStamps.join(',') + '|' + stamps.filter(stamp => !stamp.loading).length;
      $('#albumProgress').textContent = unlockedStamps.length + ' / ' + TOTAL_STAMPS;
      $('#choiceCount').textContent = String(availableStampChoices());
      $('#chooseStampBtn').disabled = availableStampChoices() < 1;
      if (!force && renderAlbum.signature === signature) return;
      renderAlbum.signature = signature;
      const wall = $('#stampWall');
      wall.className = 'album-wall style-' + stampWallStyle;
      const chapters = Math.ceil(stamps.length/10);
      wall.style.setProperty('--wall-height',Math.max(610,chapters*520 + 78) + 'px');
      wall.replaceChildren();
      stamps.forEach((stamp,index) => wall.append(stampButton(stamp,index)));
    }
    function choiceCandidates() {
      const locked = stamps.map((stamp,index) => index).filter(index => !unlockedStamps.includes(index));
      if (!locked.length) return [];
      const start = (earnedStampChoices()*7 + unlockedStamps.length*11)%locked.length;
      return [0,1,2].map(offset => locked[(start+offset*17)%locked.length]).filter((value,index,array) => array.indexOf(value) === index);
    }
    function openStampChoices() {
      if (!availableStampChoices()) return;
      const choices = $('#stampChoices');
      choices.replaceChildren();
      choiceCandidates().forEach((stampIndex,choiceIndex) => {
        const stamp = stamps[stampIndex];
        const button = document.createElement('button');
        button.type = 'button';
        button.className = 'stamp-choice';
        const image = document.createElement('img');
        image.src = stamp.img || stampPlaceholder(stampIndex);
        image.alt = '';
        image.onerror = () => { image.onerror = null; image.src = stampPlaceholder(stampIndex); };
        const label = document.createElement('b');
        label.textContent = ['I','II','III'][choiceIndex] || String(choiceIndex+1);
        const note = document.createElement('small');
        localized(note,'RICORDO VELATO','VEILED MEMORY');
        button.append(image,label,note);
        button.onclick = () => unlockStamp(stampIndex);
        choices.append(button);
      });
      $('#stampChoiceModal').classList.add('open');
    }
    function unlockStamp(index) {
      if (!availableStampChoices() || unlockedStamps.includes(index)) return;
      unlockedStamps.push(index);
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-unlocked-stamps-v7',JSON.stringify(unlockedStamps));
      $('#stampChoiceModal').classList.remove('open');
      renderAlbum(true);
      const card = $('.stamp-card[data-stamp-index="' + index + '"]');
      if (card) card.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'});
      setTimeout(() => {
        replayStampColour(card);
        openStampPreview(index,true);
      },320);
    }
    function previewCompleteWall() {
      const wall = $('#stampWall');
      clearTimeout(wallPreviewTimer);
      wall.classList.add('demo');
      $('#albumView').classList.add('previewing');
      $('#wallPreviewLabel').classList.add('open');
      wallPreviewTimer = setTimeout(closeCompleteWallPreview,12000);
    }
    function closeCompleteWallPreview() {
      clearTimeout(wallPreviewTimer);
      $('#stampWall').classList.remove('demo');
      $('#wallPreviewLabel').classList.remove('open');
      $('#albumView').classList.remove('previewing');
    }
    function openStampPreview(index,force) {
      const unlocked = unlockedStamps.includes(index);
      if (!unlocked && !force) return;
      currentStampIndex = index;
      const stamp = stamps[index];
      const source = stamp.img || stampPlaceholder(index);
      $('#previewStampImage').src = source;
      $('#previewStampImage').alt = stamp.title;
      $('#previewYear').textContent = stamp.year;
      $('#previewTitle').textContent = stamp.title;
      const story = friendlyStampStory(stamp,index);
      localized($('#previewDescription'),story.it,story.en);
      $('#stampNarrationBtn').dataset.speech = story.it;
      renderStampStudyWall(index);
      $('.stamp-study-collection').style.setProperty('--scene-image','url("' + scenes[sceneIndex].img + '")');
      const meta = $('#previewMeta');
      meta.replaceChildren();
      const archiveTag = document.createElement('span');
      localizedKey(archiveTag,'sourceArchive');
      meta.append(archiveTag);
      ['WIKIMEDIA COMMONS','№ ' + String(index+1).padStart(3,'0')].forEach(value => {
        const tag = document.createElement('span');
        tag.textContent = value;
        meta.append(tag);
      });
      renderStampWords(index);
      $('#stampWords').classList.remove('open');
      $('#stampPreview').classList.add('open');
      const previewCard = $('#stampPreview .preview-card');
      ['stamp-awakening','stamp-live','stamp-st1','stamp-st2','stamp-st3'].forEach(name => previewCard.classList.remove(name));
      void previewCard.offsetWidth;
      previewCard.classList.add('stamp-awakening');
      (previewCard._awakeningTimers || []).forEach(clearTimeout);
      previewCard._awakeningTimers = [
        setTimeout(() => previewCard.classList.add('stamp-st1'),260),
        setTimeout(() => previewCard.classList.add('stamp-st2'),640),
        setTimeout(() => previewCard.classList.add('stamp-st3'),1020),
        setTimeout(() => ['stamp-awakening','stamp-live','stamp-st1','stamp-st2','stamp-st3'].forEach(name => previewCard.classList.remove(name)),1600)
      ];
    }
    function friendlyStampStory(stamp,index) {
      const openings = [
        ['Vieni, guardiamolo da vicino.','Come closer, let us look at it together.'],
        ['Sai cosa mi piace di questo francobollo?','Do you know what I like about this stamp?'],
        ['Immagina di trovarlo su una vecchia lettera italiana.','Imagine finding it on an old Italian letter.'],
        ['Ti faccio notare un dettaglio piccolo ma importante.','Let me point out one small but important detail.']
      ];
      const details = [
        ['Il colore, il valore e il disegno raccontano il gusto del suo tempo. Non serve essere esperti: basta osservare con calma.','Its colour, value and design reveal the taste of its time. You do not need to be an expert; just look slowly.'],
        ['Pensa alle mani che lo hanno scelto, incollato e spedito. Un oggetto minuscolo poteva attraversare tutta l’Italia.','Think of the hands that chose, attached and posted it. This tiny object could travel across Italy.'],
        ['Il timbro e i bordi non sono difetti: sono tracce del viaggio. È proprio questo che rende ogni esemplare diverso.','The postmark and edges are not flaws; they are traces of its journey. That is what makes each copy different.'],
        ['Osserva prima l’immagine e poi le parole. In pochi centimetri, grafica, lingua e storia riescono a stare insieme.','Look at the image first, then the words. In a few centimetres, design, language and history fit together.']
      ];
      const opening = openings[index%openings.length];
      const detail = details[Math.floor(index/openings.length)%details.length];
      return {it:opening[0] + ' ' + stamp.it + ' ' + detail[0],en:opening[1] + ' ' + stamp.en + ' ' + detail[1]};
    }
    function renderStampStudyWall(activeIndex) {
      const wall = $('#stampStudyWall');
      wall.replaceChildren();
      const layout = [
        [49,45,168,-1],[17,31,82,-5],[82,27,76,4],[12,67,91,3],[85,64,86,-4],[35,17,62,4],[66,15,55,-3],
        [32,75,73,-4],[66,79,87,4],[49,91,54,2],[6,43,48,-5],[94,43,52,5],[23,50,52,2],[75,49,56,-2]
      ];
      const candidates = [activeIndex].concat(unlockedStamps,stamps.map((_,index) => index)).filter((value,index,array) => array.indexOf(value) === index).slice(0,layout.length);
      candidates.forEach((stampIndex,position) => {
        const stamp = stamps[stampIndex];
        const unlocked = unlockedStamps.includes(stampIndex) || stampIndex === activeIndex;
        const button = document.createElement('button');
        button.type = 'button';
        button.className = 'stamp-study-thumb' + (stampIndex === activeIndex ? ' on' : '') + (unlocked ? '' : ' locked');
        button.style.setProperty('--x',layout[position][0] + '%');
        button.style.setProperty('--y',layout[position][1] + '%');
        button.style.setProperty('--w',layout[position][2] + 'px');
        button.style.setProperty('--r',layout[position][3] + 'deg');
        const image = document.createElement('img');
        image.src = stamp.img || stampPlaceholder(stampIndex); image.alt = stamp.title;
        image.onerror = () => { image.onerror = null; image.src = stampPlaceholder(stampIndex); };
        button.append(image);
        if (unlocked) button.onclick = () => openStampPreview(stampIndex,true);
        wall.append(button);
      });
    }
    function wordsForStamp(index) {
      return [
        {lemma:'francobollo',form:'il francobollo',syll:'fran-co-ból-lo',it:'piccola carta per la posta',en:'stamp',hint:'Pensa a una piccola finestra sulla busta.'},
        {lemma:'guardare',form:'guarda',syll:'guar-dà-re',it:'usare gli occhi con attenzione',en:'to look',hint:'Guarda: è un invito molto comune.'},
        {lemma:'mostrare',form:'mostra',syll:'mo-strà-re',it:'far vedere',en:'to show',hint:'Una mostra fa vedere opere.'},
        {lemma:'storia',form:'la storia',syll:'stò-ria',it:'racconto del passato',en:'history / story',hint:'Storia può essere history o story.'},
        {lemma:'italiano',form:'italiano',syll:'i-ta-lià-no',it:'dell’Italia',en:'Italian',hint:'Italia → italiano.'},
        {lemma:'osservare',form:'osserva',syll:'os-ser-và-re',it:'guardare con calma',en:'to observe',hint:'È guardare più attentamente.'},
        {lemma:'immagine',form:'l’immagine',syll:'im-mà-gi-ne',it:'figura o fotografia',en:'image',hint:'Immagina una immagine.'},
        {lemma:'nome',form:'il nome',syll:'nó-me',it:'come si chiama qualcosa',en:'name',hint:'Come ti chiami? Il mio nome…'},
        {lemma:'anno',form:'l’anno',syll:'àn-no',it:'dodici mesi',en:'year',hint:'Due enne: an-no.'},
        {lemma:'valore',form:'il valore',syll:'va-ló-re',it:'quanto vale qualcosa',en:'value',hint:'Valere → valore.'}
      ];
    }
    let wordListenStats = {};
    try { wordListenStats = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gelato-word-listens-v14') || '{}') || {}; } catch (error) { wordListenStats = {}; }
    function trackWordListen(word,source) {
      const key = String(word || '').trim().toLocaleLowerCase('it-IT');
      if (!key) return;
      const entry = wordListenStats[key] || {word:String(word).trim(),total:0,stamp:0,culture:0};
      entry.total += 1; entry[source] = Number(entry[source] || 0)+1; entry.last = Date.now();
      wordListenStats[key] = entry;
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-word-listens-v14',JSON.stringify(wordListenStats));
      renderLexicon();
    }
    function speakItalian(text,word,source) {
      if (!('speechSynthesis' in window)) return showToast(textFor('La voce non è disponibile su questo dispositivo.','Voice is not available on this device.'));
      if (word && source) trackWordListen(word,source);
      speechSynthesis.cancel();
      const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
      utterance.lang = 'it-IT'; utterance.rate = .82;
      const voice = speechSynthesis.getVoices().find(item => /^it(-|_)/i.test(item.lang));
      if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;
      speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
    }
    function renderStampWords(index) {
      const list = $('#stampWords');
      list.replaceChildren();
      const tools = document.createElement('header'); tools.className = 'word-tools';
      const title = document.createElement('b'); title.textContent = textFor('10 PAROLE DA PORTARE CON TE','10 WORDS TO TAKE WITH YOU');
      const memory = document.createElement('button'); memory.type = 'button'; memory.textContent = textFor('AIUTI MEMORIA','MEMORY HINTS');
      memory.onclick = () => list.classList.toggle('show-hints'); tools.append(title,memory); list.append(tools);
      wordsForStamp(index).forEach(word => {
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.className = 'word-row';
        const left = document.createElement('b');
        left.textContent = word.lemma + ' → ' + word.form + ' · ' + word.syll;
        const right = document.createElement('span');
        localized(right,word.it,word.en);
        const play = document.createElement('button'); play.type='button'; play.className='word-audio'; play.textContent='▶'; play.onclick=()=>speakItalian(word.form,word.lemma,'stamp');
        const count = document.createElement('em'); count.className='listen-count'; count.textContent=String((wordListenStats[word.lemma] && wordListenStats[word.lemma].stamp) || 0) + '×';
        const hint = document.createElement('small'); hint.className='word-hint'; hint.textContent=word.hint;
        row.append(left,right,play,count,hint);
        list.append(row);
      });
    }
    function openImmersive() {
      const stamp = stamps[currentStampIndex];
      const source = stamp.img || stampPlaceholder(currentStampIndex);
      $('#immersiveImage').src = source;
      $('#immersiveImage').alt = stamp.title;
      $('#magnifier').style.backgroundImage = 'url("' + source + '")';
      $('#stampPreview').classList.remove('open');
      $('#stampImmersive').classList.add('open');
    }
    function moveMagnifier(event) {
      const image = $('#immersiveImage');
      const lens = $('#magnifier');
      const stage = $('#immersiveStage');
      const imageRect = image.getBoundingClientRect();
      const stageRect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
      const inside = event.clientX >= imageRect.left && event.clientX <= imageRect.right &&
        event.clientY >= imageRect.top && event.clientY <= imageRect.bottom;
      if (!inside) {
        lens.style.display = 'none';
        image.style.filter = 'drop-shadow(0 35px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.55)) brightness(.55)';
        return;
      }
      lens.style.display = 'block';
      image.style.filter = 'drop-shadow(0 35px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.55)) brightness(.7)';
      const radius = lens.offsetWidth/2;
      const x = event.clientX-imageRect.left;
      const y = event.clientY-imageRect.top;
      const zoom = 2.5;
      lens.style.left = String(event.clientX-stageRect.left-radius) + 'px';
      lens.style.top = String(event.clientY-stageRect.top-radius) + 'px';
      lens.style.backgroundSize = String(imageRect.width*zoom) + 'px ' + String(imageRect.height*zoom) + 'px';
      lens.style.backgroundPosition = String(radius-x*zoom) + 'px ' + String(radius-y*zoom) + 'px';
    }
