La Sardegna ti regala vento, mare e una nuova pagina.',en:'Cagliari closes the first journey. Sardinia gives you wind, sea and a new page.'}

    let activeCity = 0;
    let mapLoaded = false;
    function unlockedCityCount() {
      return Math.min(cities.length,1+Math.floor(unlockedStamps.length/3));
    }
    function projectPoint(longitude,latitude) {
      return [(longitude-6.1)/13.1*390,(47.35-latitude)/11.7*520];
    }
    function ringPath(ring) {
      return ring.map((point,index) => {
        const projected = projectPoint(point[0],point[1]);
        return (index ? 'L' : 'M') + projected[0].toFixed(2) + ',' + projected[1].toFixed(2);
      }).join('') + 'Z';
    }
    function topoArc(topology,index) {
      const reverse = index < 0;
      const arc = topology.arcs[reverse ? ~index : index];
      let x = 0;
      let y = 0;
      const scale = topology.transform.scale;
      const translate = topology.transform.translate;
      const points = arc.map(delta => {
        x += delta[0];
        y += delta[1];
        return [x*scale[0]+translate[0],y*scale[1]+translate[1]];
      });
      return reverse ? points.reverse() : points;
    }
    function topoRing(topology,ids) {
      const output = [];
      ids.forEach((id,index) => {
        const arc = topoArc(topology,id);
        if (index) arc.shift();
        output.push.apply(output,arc);
      });
      return output;
    }
    function topoPath(topology,geometry) {
      const polygons = geometry.type === 'Polygon' ? [geometry.arcs] : geometry.arcs;
      return polygons.map(polygon => polygon.map(ring => ringPath(topoRing(topology,ring))).join('')).join('');
    }
    async function loadItalyMap() {
      const svg = $('#italyMap');
      try {
        const response = await fetch('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openpolis/geojson-italy/refs/heads/master/topojson/limits_IT_regions.topo.json');
        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('map');
        const data = await response.json();
        const features = data.objects.regions.geometries;
        svg.innerHTML = features.map(feature =>
          '<path class="region" data-region="' + feature.properties.reg_name + '" d="' + topoPath(data,feature) + '"></path>'
        ).join('') +
          '<text id="mapTyrrhenian" x="39" y="220" fill="#8fa9a7" opacity=".55" font-size="8">MAR TIRRENO</text>' +
          '<text id="mapAdriatic" x="322" y="255" fill="#8fa9a7" opacity=".55" font-size="8" transform="rotate(67 322 255)">MARE ADRIATICO</text>';
      } catch (error) {
        svg.innerHTML = '<path class="region unlocked focus" data-region="Lazio" d="M210 34 C150 55 138 108 170 142 C131 173 155 229 207 247 C184 285 214 326 254 341 C235 378 264 428 303 473 C318 489 335 481 329 459 C315 414 294 378 303 337 C312 298 287 269 261 245 C296 199 275 154 241 127 C267 83 253 49 210 34 Z"></path><text id="mapOffline" x="200" y="520" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b8afa2" font-size="10">ITALIA · OFFLINE</text>';
      }
      mapLoaded = true;
      renderMapLanguage();
      renderJourney();
    }
    function renderMapLanguage() {
      if ($('#mapTyrrhenian')) $('#mapTyrrhenian').textContent = textFor('MAR TIRRENO','TYRRHENIAN SEA');
      if ($('#mapAdriatic')) $('#mapAdriatic').textContent = textFor('MARE ADRIATICO','ADRIATIC SEA');
      if ($('#mapOffline')) $('#mapOffline').textContent = textFor('ITALIA · OFFLINE','ITALY · OFFLINE');
    }
    function renderCityPoints() {
      const svg = $('#italyMap');
      svg.querySelectorAll('.city-point').forEach(point => point.remove());
      const unlocked = unlockedCityCount();
      cities.forEach((city,index) => {
        const projected = projectPoint(city.lon,city.lat);
        const group = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','g');
        group.setAttribute('class','city-point ' + (index >= unlocked ? 'locked' : ''));
        group.setAttribute('transform','translate(' + projected[0] + ' ' + projected[1] + ')');
        group.innerHTML =
          '<circle class="pulse" r="4"></circle><circle class="core" r="4"></circle>' +
          '<text x="7" y="3">' + city.name + '</text>';
        group.onclick = () => {
          if (index >= unlocked) {
            const remaining = 3-unlockedStamps.length%3;
            showToast(textFor('Servono ancora ' + remaining + ' francobolli per accendere ' + city.name + '.',remaining + ' more stamps will light ' + city.name + '.'));
            return;
          }
          activeCity = index;
          renderJourney();
        };
        svg.append(group);
      });
    }
    function renderJourney() {
      if (!mapLoaded) return;
      const unlocked = unlockedCityCount();
      activeCity = Math.min(activeCity,unlocked-1);
      const city = cities[activeCity];
      $$('.region').forEach(region => {
        const cityIndex = cities.findIndex(item => item.region === region.dataset.region);
        region.classList.toggle('unlocked',cityIndex >= 0 && cityIndex < unlocked);
        region.classList.toggle('focus',region.dataset.region === city.region);
      });
      renderCityPoints();
      localized(
        $('#cityRegion'),
        city.region.toUpperCase() + ' · ' + (activeCity === 0 ? 'BENVENUTO' : 'CITTÀ ' + String(activeCity+1)),
        city.region.toUpperCase() + ' · ' + (activeCity === 0 ? 'WELCOME' : 'CITY ' + String(activeCity+1))
      );
      $('#cityTitle').textContent = city.name;
      localized($('#cityCopy'),city.it,city.en);
      $('#cityEffect').dataset.symbol = city.symbol;
      localized($('#cityEffect'),city.effectIt,city.effectEn);
      $('#journeyFill').style.setProperty('--p',String(unlocked/cities.length*100) + '%');
      localized($('#journeyText'),String(unlocked) + ' di ' + String(cities.length) + ' città illuminate',String(unlocked) + ' of ' + String(cities.length) + ' cities lit');
      const off = $('#mapWrap').classList.contains('lights-off');
      localized($('#lampLabel'),off ? I18N.it.lightOff : I18N.it.lightOn,off ? I18N.en.lightOff : I18N.en.lightOn);
    }

        ['Venezia','Collezione Peggy Guggenheim','Peggy Guggenheim Collection','Peggy Guggenheim Collection Venice garden','L’arte moderna vive in una casa sul Canal Grande: le dimensioni rendono la visita più intima.','Modern art lives in a house on the Grand Canal, where the scale makes a visit feel intimate.'],
        ['Roma','MAXXI','MAXXI','MAXXI Rome architecture','Scale, rampe e curve guidano il corpo prima ancora dello sguardo: anche l’edificio è parte della mostra.','Stairs, ramps and curves guide the body before the eye; the building itself is part of the display.'],
        ['Roma','Galleria Borghese','Borghese Gallery','Galleria Borghese Rome interior','Le opere abitano ancora le stanze di una villa: conviene guardare anche soffitti, pavimenti e porte.','The works still inhabit villa rooms, so ceilings, floors and doors deserve attention too.'],
        ['Venezia','Gallerie dell’Accademia','Accademia Galleries','Gallerie Accademia Venice interior','Qui la pittura veneziana mostra quanto luce, colore e acqua siano legati nella storia della città.','Venetian painting here shows how light, colour and water are tied to the city’s history.'],
        ['Milano','Museo della Scienza','Science Museum Milan','Leonardo da Vinci science museum Milan','Modelli, macchine e laboratori fanno capire la scienza attraverso oggetti che si possono osservare da vicino.','Models, machines and workshops make science understandable through objects seen up close.'],
        ['Torino','Museo del Cinema','Cinema Museum','National Cinema Museum Turin Mole interior','Dentro la Mole, cinema e architettura crescono insieme in verticale.','Inside the Mole, cinema and architecture rise together vertically.'],
        ['Napoli','Museo Archeologico Nazionale','National Archaeological Museum','Naples archaeological museum interior','Mosaici e oggetti provenienti dall’area vesuviana riportano gesti quotidiani di duemila anni fa.','Mosaics and objects from the Vesuvius area bring back everyday gestures from two thousand years ago.'],
        ['Ferrara','Palazzo dei Diamanti','Palazzo dei Diamanti','Palazzo dei Diamanti Ferrara facade','Migliaia di blocchi a punta cambiano tono con il sole e rendono la facciata quasi mobile.','Thousands of pointed blocks change tone in sunlight, making the façade seem to move.'],
        ['Milano','Triennale Milano','Triennale Milano','Triennale Milano design museum interior','Mostre di progetto, grafica e architettura raccontano come gli oggetti entrano nella vita quotidiana.','Exhibitions of design, graphics and architecture show how objects enter everyday life.'],
        ['Rovereto','MART','MART Rovereto','MART Rovereto museum courtyard','Una grande cupola di vetro raccoglie il cielo sopra la piazza centrale del museo.','A large glass dome gathers the sky over the museum’s central square.'],
        ['Firenze','Museo Novecento','Museo Novecento','Museo Novecento Florence interior','Il Novecento italiano viene raccontato in stanze raccolte, con attenzione anche a grafica e città.','Twentieth-century Italy is told in intimate rooms, with attention to graphics and the city too.'],
        ['Torino','Museo dell’Automobile','Automobile Museum','Museo automobile Torino cars','Le automobili mostrano come tecnica, velocità e stile siano cambiati insieme.','Cars show how engineering, speed and style changed together.']
      ],
      style:[
        ['Italia','La Vespa','The Vespa','classic Vespa scooter Italy design','La scocca curva nasconde la meccanica e crea una forma riconoscibile anche solo dalla silhouette.','The curved body hides the mechanics and creates a shape recognisable from its silhouette alone.'],
        ['Ivrea','La Lettera 22','The Lettera 22','Olivetti Lettera 22 typewriter','Compatta e leggera, questa macchina da scrivere mostrò che uno strumento da lavoro poteva essere anche elegante.','Compact and light, this typewriter showed that a work tool could also be elegant.'],
        ['Torino','La Fiat 500','The Fiat 500','vintage Fiat 500 Italy','Piccola fuori ma ingegnosa dentro, ha trasformato il modo di muoversi nelle città italiane.','Small outside but clever inside, it changed how people moved through Italian cities.'],
        ['Murano','Il vetro soffiato','Blown glass','Murano glass artisan workshop','Calore, respiro e gesto danno forma al vetro; ogni piccola variazione rimane visibile.','Heat, breath and gesture shape the glass, leaving every small variation visible.'],
        ['Italia','La moka','The moka pot','Italian moka coffee maker design','La forma ottagonale è pratica e immediata: pochi pezzi costruiscono un rito domestico riconoscibile.','Its octagonal form is practical and immediate; a few parts create a recognisable home ritual.'],
        ['Milano','Memphis Milano','Memphis Milano','Memphis Milano furniture design','Colori forti e geometrie giocose sfidarono l’idea che il buon design dovesse essere serio e discreto.','Bold colours and playful geometry challenged the idea that good design had to be serious and quiet.'],
        ['Venezia','Il terrazzo veneziano','Venetian terrazzo','Venetian terrazzo floor Italy','Piccoli frammenti di pietra creano superfici continue, resistenti e sempre diverse.','Small stone fragments create continuous surfaces that are strong and always different.'],
        ['Napoli','La sartoria','Tailoring','Italian tailor workshop Naples','Misure, prove e correzioni trasformano il tessuto in un abito pensato per una persona precisa.','Measurements, fittings and corrections turn cloth into a garment made for one person.'],
        ['Milano','La lampada Arco','The Arco lamp','Arco lamp Castiglioni Italian design','Una base pesante e un lungo arco portano la luce sopra il tavolo senza fissarla al soffitto.','A heavy base and long curve carry light over a table without attaching it to the ceiling.'],
        ['Milano','Le sedie di Gio Ponti','Gio Ponti chairs','Gio Ponti Superleggera chair','Ridurre il peso senza perdere solidità è una piccola lezione di equilibrio e precisione.','Reducing weight without losing strength is a small lesson in balance and precision.'],
        ['Ravenna','Disegnare con tessere','Drawing with tiles','Ravenna mosaic detail pattern','Nel mosaico il colore non è una superficie liscia: cambia con ogni tessera e con ogni raggio di luce.','In mosaic, colour is not a smooth surface; it changes with every tile and ray of light.'],
        ['Italia','Le insegne dipinte','Painted signs','vintage Italian shop sign typography','Lettere, ombre e colori raccontavano subito il carattere di una bottega.','Letters, shadows and colours once announced a shop’s character at a glance.'],
        ['Carrara','Il marmo bianco','White marble','Carrara marble quarry Italy','Prima di diventare scultura o edificio, il marmo è una montagna segnata da grandi tagli geometrici.','Before becoming sculpture or architecture, marble is a mountain marked by large geometric cuts.'],
        ['Como','La seta stampata','Printed silk','Como silk textile printing Italy','Disegno e colore devono incontrarsi con precisione su un tessuto leggerissimo.','Pattern and colour must meet precisely on an extremely light fabric.'],
        ['Firenze','La carta marmorizzata','Marbled paper','Florentine marbled paper artisan','Il colore galleggia sull’acqua e viene trasferito sulla carta in un disegno impossibile da ripetere identico.','Colour floats on water and transfers to paper in a pattern that can never be repeated exactly.'],
        ['Faenza','La ceramica','Ceramics','Faenza Italian ceramics workshop','Il nome della città è diventato legato alla maiolica: terra, smalto e fuoco lavorano insieme.','The city’s name became linked with maiolica; clay, glaze and fire work together.'],
        ['Sardegna','I tessuti tradizionali','Traditional textiles','Sardinian traditional textile weaving','Trame geometriche e materiali locali conservano gesti lenti del telaio.','Geometric patterns and local materials preserve the slow gestures of the loom.']
      ],
      literature:[
        ['Firenze','Dante e la lingua','Dante and language','Dante Alighieri portrait Florence','Dante scrisse in volgare e aiutò quella lingua a diventare un riferimento per l’italiano.','Dante wrote in the vernacular and helped it become a foundation for Italian.'],
        ['Arezzo','Petrarca e le parole scelte','Petrarch and chosen words','Francesco Petrarca portrait','La sua poesia mostra quanto ritmo e scelta delle parole possano rendere intensa una voce interiore.','His poetry shows how rhythm and word choice can make an inner voice intense.'],
        ['Certaldo','Boccaccio e le storie','Boccaccio and stories','Giovanni Boccaccio portrait','Nel Decameron persone diverse raccontano storie: la lingua cambia con caratteri e situazioni.','In the Decameron, different people tell stories, and language changes with character and situation.'],
        ['Firenze','Machiavelli osservatore','Machiavelli the observer','Niccolo Machiavelli portrait','Guardava con attenzione politica e comportamento umano, cercando parole dirette per descriverli.','He closely observed politics and human behaviour, seeking direct words to describe them.'],
        ['Ferrara','Ariosto e l’avventura','Ariosto and adventure','Ludovico Ariosto portrait','Il racconto cambia continuamente strada, come un viaggio pieno di incontri e deviazioni.','The story constantly changes direction, like a journey full of encounters and detours.'],
        ['Sorrento','Tasso e il ritmo','Tasso and rhythm','Torquato Tasso portrait','Nella sua poesia il ritmo guida battaglie, paesaggi e momenti di esitazione.','In his poetry, rhythm guides battles, landscapes and moments of hesitation.'],
        ['Milano','Manzoni e l’italiano','Manzoni and Italian','Alessandro Manzoni portrait','Lavorò a lungo sulla lingua del romanzo perché potesse parlare a lettori di regioni diverse.','He worked for years on the novel’s language so it could speak to readers from different regions.'],
        ['Recanati','Leopardi e l’orizzonte','Leopardi and the horizon','Giacomo Leopardi Recanati portrait','Un paesaggio vicino può aprire pensieri enormi: per lui osservare e immaginare erano legati.','A nearby landscape can open enormous thoughts; for him, observation and imagination were linked.'],
        ['Toscana','Collodi e Pinocchio','Collodi and Pinocchio','Carlo Collodi Pinocchio vintage illustration','Una storia per ragazzi usa viaggio, errori e trasformazioni per parlare di crescita e responsabilità.','A story for young readers uses travel, mistakes and change to explore growth and responsibility.'],
        ['Sicilia','Verga e le voci vere','Verga and real voices','Giovanni Verga portrait','Cercò una lingua vicina ai luoghi e alle persone raccontate, senza renderle decorative.','He sought language close to the places and people he described, without turning them into decoration.'],
        ['Agrigento','Pirandello e le maschere','Pirandello and masks','Luigi Pirandello portrait','I suoi personaggi scoprono spesso che ciascuno viene visto in modo diverso dagli altri.','His characters often discover that every person is seen differently by others.'],
        ['Liguria','Calvino e la leggerezza','Calvino and lightness','Italo Calvino portrait','Sapeva rendere precise anche le idee fantastiche, usando strutture chiare e immagini sorprendenti.','He could make even fantastic ideas precise through clear structures and surprising images.'],
        ['Piemonte','Rodari e il gioco','Rodari and play','Gianni Rodari portrait','Per Rodari, sbagliare una parola poteva diventare l’inizio di una storia nuova.','For Rodari, getting a word wrong could become the start of a new story.'],
        ['Alessandria','Eco e i segni','Eco and signs','Umberto Eco portrait','Studiava come oggetti, immagini e parole producono significato, anche nella vita quotidiana.','He studied how objects, images and words create meaning, even in everyday life.'],
        ['Palermo','Tomasi di Lampedusa','Tomasi di Lampedusa','Giuseppe Tomasi di Lampedusa portrait','Nel suo romanzo la Sicilia cambia lentamente mentre una famiglia osserva il proprio mondo trasformarsi.','In his novel, Sicily changes slowly while a family watches its world transform.'],
        ['Torino','Natalia Ginzburg','Natalia Ginzburg','Natalia Ginzburg portrait','La sua prosa trova forza in parole quotidiane, dialoghi familiari e dettagli apparentemente semplici.','Her prose finds strength in everyday words, family conversations and apparently simple details.']
      ],
      curiosity:[
        ['Italia','La passeggiata','The passeggiata','Italian evening passeggiata street','Nel tardo pomeriggio molte persone escono semplicemente per camminare, incontrarsi e guardare la città.','In late afternoon, many people go out simply to walk, meet others and watch the city.'],
        ['Italia','Un saluto per ogni ora','A greeting for every hour','Italian street greeting people','Buongiorno, buonasera e salve cambiano con l’ora e con il grado di familiarità.','Buongiorno, buonasera and salve change with the time and level of familiarity.'],
        ['Roma','Le fontanelle nasone','The nasoni fountains','Rome nasone drinking fountain','Le piccole fontane pubbliche romane danno acqua potabile e il loro beccuccio ricorda un grande naso.','Rome’s small public fountains provide drinking water and their spout resembles a large nose.'],
        ['Italia','Il campanile dà il ritmo','The bell tower keeps time','Italian bell tower town square','Per secoli il suono delle campane ha segnato ore, feste e momenti importanti della comunità.','For centuries, bells marked the hours, festivals and important community moments.'],
        ['Italia','Parlare anche con le mani','Speaking with hands','Italian hand gestures conversation','I gesti cambiano per regione e situazione: sono un aiuto alla conversazione, non una lingua universale.','Gestures vary by region and situation; they support conversation but are not a universal language.'],
        ['Firenze','Numeri civici di due colori','Two colours of house numbers','Florence red black house numbers','A Firenze i numeri neri indicano abitazioni e quelli rossi tradizionalmente attività commerciali.','In Florence, black numbers mark homes, while red ones traditionally mark businesses.'],
        ['Italia','Il coperto','The coperto','Italian restaurant table place setting','In alcuni ristoranti il conto include il coperto, una voce indicata nel menu legata al servizio del tavolo.','Some restaurants include a coperto, a menu-listed charge connected to table service.'],
        ['Italia','Il caffè al banco','Coffee at the counter','Italian cafe counter espresso','Al banco il gesto è rapido: si ordina, si beve e si lascia spazio alla persona successiva.','At the counter the ritual is quick: order, drink and make room for the next person.'],
        ['Puglia','I trulli','The trulli','Alberobello trulli roofs','I tetti conici sono costruiti con pietre sovrapposte e danno al paesaggio una geometria inconfondibile.','The conical roofs are built from overlapping stones, giving the landscape unmistakable geometry.'],
        ['Pisa','Perché la torre pende','Why the tower leans','Leaning Tower Pisa','Il terreno cedevole fece inclinare la torre già durante la costruzione, iniziata nel Medioevo.','Soft ground made the tower tilt while it was still being built in the Middle Ages.'],
        ['Venezia','Quando arriva l’acqua alta','When high water arrives','Venice acqua alta raised walkways','Con le maree più alte, passerelle temporanee aiutano a muoversi in alcune zone della città.','During the highest tides, temporary walkways help people move through parts of the city.'],
        ['Italia','Tanti dialetti','Many dialects','Italian regional dialect map','Accanto all’italiano vivono dialetti e lingue locali, con suoni e parole diversi anche tra città vicine.','Alongside Italian are dialects and local languages, with different sounds and words even between nearby cities.'],
        ['Italia','Ferragosto','Ferragosto','Ferragosto Italian beach town August','Il quindici agosto molte città rallentano e famiglie o amici organizzano una giornata insieme.','On 15 August many cities slow down and families or friends plan a day together.'],
        ['Italia','La Befana','The Befana','Italian Befana tradition illustration','Nella tradizione, la notte prima dell’Epifania una figura anziana porta dolci ai bambini.','Tradition says that on the night before Epiphany, an elderly figure brings sweets to children.'],
        ['Italia','Il nome del giorno','The name day','Italian calendar name day tradition','Alcune famiglie ricordano ancora l’onomastico, il giorno legato al santo che porta lo stesso nome.','Some families still mark the name day associated with a saint who shares a person’s name.'],
        ['Italia','Convalidare il biglietto','Validating a ticket','Italian train ticket validation machine','Con alcuni biglietti cartacei regionali bisogna controllare se è richiesta la convalida prima del viaggio.','With some paper regional tickets, check whether validation is required before travelling.']
      ]
    };
    const cultureWordPools = {
      city:[['la città','city'],['la strada','street'],['la piazza','square'],['il quartiere','neighbourhood'],['camminare','to walk'],['guardare','to look'],['vicino','near'],['antico','ancient']],
      food:[['il sapore','flavour'],['la cucina','kitchen / cuisine'],['assaggiare','to taste'],['morbido','soft'],['croccante','crisp'],['il piatto','dish'],['preparare','to prepare'],['fresco','fresh']],
      museum:[['il museo','museum'],['l’opera','work of art'],['la sala','room / gallery'],['la mostra','exhibition'],['osservare','to observe'],['la collezione','collection'],['la luce','light'],['il percorso','route']],
      style:[['il design','design'],['la forma','shape'],['il colore','colour'],['il materiale','material'],['disegnare','to design / draw'],['leggero','lightweight'],['la linea','line'],['il dettaglio','detail']],
      literature:[['il libro','book'],['la storia','story'],['la parola','word'],['lo scrittore','writer'],['leggere','to read'],['raccontare','to tell'],['la voce','voice'],['il personaggio','character']],
      curiosity:[['l’abitudine','habit'],['la tradizione','tradition'],['ogni giorno','every day'],['incontrare','to meet'],['il gesto','gesture'],['la festa','festival'],['ricordare','to remember'],['diverso','different']]
    };
    const cultureItems = Object.entries(cultureTopicRows).flatMap(([cat,rows]) => rows.map((row,index) => {
      const pool = cultureWordPools[cat];
      const words = [0,1,2].map(offset => { const pair = pool[(index*2+offset)%pool.length]; return {word:pair[0],en:pair[1]}; });
      return {cat,place:row[0],title:row[1],titleEn:row[2],query:row[3],it:'Ti porto qui per un momento: ' + row[4] + ' Guarda con calma il dettaglio che ti incuriosisce di più.',en:'Let me bring you here for a moment: ' + row[5] + ' Take your time and notice the detail that catches your eye.',words};
    }));
    let cultureFilter = 'all';
    let activeCulture = null;
    let cultureImageCache = {};
    try { cultureImageCache = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gelato-culture-images-v14') || '{}') || {}; } catch (error) { cultureImageCache = {}; }
    const cultureCategoryOrder = ['city','food','museum','style','literature','curiosity'];
    let cultureImageObserver = null;
    function greeting() {
      const hour = basisParts().hour;
      if (hour < 5) return {it:'Buonanotte! Studiamo con calma, sotto le luci della città.',en:'Good night! Let us study calmly under the city lights.'};
      if (hour < 12) return {it:'Buongiorno! Oggi scegliamo una piccola storia e tre parole nuove.',en:'Good morning! Today we choose a small story and three new words.'};
      if (hour < 18) return {it:'Buon pomeriggio! Facciamo una piccola passeggiata insieme.',en:'Good afternoon! Let us take a small walk together.'};
      return {it:'Buonasera! Accendiamo una città e ascoltiamo la sua storia.',en:'Good evening! Let us light a city and listen to its story.'};
    }
    function renderGreeting() {
      const copy = greeting();
      localized($('#guideGreeting'),copy.it,copy.en);
    }
    function culturePlaceholder(item,index) {
      const palettes = {city:['#17272b','#b58b58'],food:['#33231b','#c19a64'],museum:['#1d2225','#a99a84'],style:['#20252a','#b69561'],literature:['#28231e','#a98762'],curiosity:['#1c2925','#c0a46c']};
      const palette = palettes[item.cat] || palettes.city;
      const title = item.title.replace(/[&<>]/g,'');
      const svg = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="900" height="620" viewBox="0 0 900 620"><defs><linearGradient id="g" x2="1" y2="1"><stop stop-color="'+palette[0]+'"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#090a09"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="900" height="620" fill="url(#g)"/><circle cx="'+(170+(index*83)%560)+'" cy="'+(100+(index*47)%380)+'" r="190" fill="'+palette[1]+'" opacity=".12"/><path d="M0 '+(420+(index%5)*18)+' Q220 300 450 430 T900 350 V620 H0Z" fill="'+palette[1]+'" opacity=".08"/><text x="54" y="526" fill="#e5d5bc" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="38">'+title+'</text><text x="57" y="567" fill="#ad9b83" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="14" letter-spacing="4">GELATO · ITALIA</text></svg>';
      return 'data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(svg);
    }
    async function resolveCultureImage(index,image) {
      const item = cultureItems[index];
      if (!item || !image) return;
      if (cultureImageCache[item.query]) { image.src = cultureImageCache[item.query]; return; }
      if (image.dataset.loading === '1') return;
      image.dataset.loading = '1';
      try {
        const params = new URLSearchParams({action:'query',generator:'search',gsrsearch:item.query + ' filetype:bitmap',gsrnamespace:'6',gsrlimit:'8',prop:'imageinfo',iiprop:'url',iiurlwidth:'900',format:'json',origin:'*'});
        const data = await fetch('https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?' + params).then(response => response.ok ? response.json() : Promise.reject(new Error('image')));
        const pages = Object.values((data.query && data.query.pages) || {});
        const chosen = pages.map(page => page.imageinfo && page.imageinfo[0]).find(info => info && /\.(?:jpe?g|png|webp)(?:\?|$)/i.test(info.thumburl || info.url || ''));
        if (chosen) {
          const source = chosen.thumburl || chosen.url;
          cultureImageCache[item.query] = source;
          localStorage.setItem('gelato-culture-images-v14',JSON.stringify(cultureImageCache));
          image.src = source;
          if (activeCulture === index && $('#cultureDialog').classList.contains('open')) $('#dialogImage').src = source;
        }
      } catch (error) {}
    }
    function watchCultureImage(image,index) {
      image.dataset.cultureIndex = String(index);
      if (!('IntersectionObserver' in window)) return resolveCultureImage(index,image);
      if (!cultureImageObserver) cultureImageObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
        cultureImageObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        resolveCultureImage(Number(entry.target.dataset.cultureIndex),entry.target);
      }),{rootMargin:'500px 0px'});
      cultureImageObserver.observe(image);
    }
    function renderCulture() {
      renderGreeting();
      const path = $('#culturePath');
      path.replaceChildren();
      const groups = cultureFilter === 'all' ? cultureCategoryOrder : [cultureFilter];
      groups.forEach(cat => {
        const section = document.createElement('section'); section.className = 'culture-group';
        const header = document.createElement('header');
        const heading = document.createElement('h3'); localizedKey(heading,cat);
        const count = document.createElement('span'); count.textContent = String(cultureItems.filter(item => item.cat === cat).length).padStart(2,'0') + ' · 100';
        header.append(heading,count);
        const grid = document.createElement('div'); grid.className = 'culture-grid';
        cultureItems.forEach((item,itemIndex) => {
          if (item.cat !== cat) return;
          const card = document.createElement('button'); card.type = 'button'; card.className = 'culture-card';
          const image = document.createElement('img'); image.src = cultureImageCache[item.query] || culturePlaceholder(item,itemIndex); image.alt = item.title; image.loading = 'lazy';
          image.onerror = () => { image.onerror = null; image.src = culturePlaceholder(item,itemIndex); };
          watchCultureImage(image,itemIndex);
          const copy = document.createElement('div');
          const small = document.createElement('small'); localized(small,item.place + ' · ' + I18N.it[item.cat],item.place + ' · ' + I18N.en[item.cat]);
          const title = document.createElement('b'); localized(title,item.title,item.titleEn);
          copy.append(small,title); card.append(image,copy); card.onclick = () => openCulture(itemIndex); grid.append(card);
        });
        section.append(header,grid); path.append(section);
      });
    }
    function openCulture(index) {
      activeCulture = index;
      const item = cultureItems[index];
      $('#dialogCity').textContent = item.place.toUpperCase() + ' · ' + textFor(I18N.it[item.cat],I18N.en[item.cat]);
      localized($('#dialogTitle'),item.title,item.titleEn);
      localized($('#dialogGuide'),item.it,item.en);
      const dialogImage = $('#dialogImage'); dialogImage.src = cultureImageCache[item.query] || culturePlaceholder(item,index); dialogImage.alt = item.title;
      resolveCultureImage(index,dialogImage);
      $('#cultureNarrationBtn').dataset.speech = item.it;
      const words = $('#dialogWords'); words.replaceChildren();
      item.words.forEach(entry => {
        const row = document.createElement('div'); row.className = 'culture-word-row';
        const word = document.createElement('b'); word.textContent = entry.word;
        const meaning = document.createElement('small'); meaning.textContent = entry.en;
        const play = document.createElement('button'); play.type = 'button'; play.textContent = '▶'; play.onclick = () => { speakItalian(entry.word,entry.word,'culture'); openCulture(index); };
        const stat = document.createElement('em'); stat.textContent = String((wordListenStats[entry.word.toLocaleLowerCase('it-IT')] && wordListenStats[entry.word.toLocaleLowerCase('it-IT')].culture) || 0) + '×';
        row.append(word,meaning,play,stat); words.append(row);
      });
      $('#cultureDialog').classList.add('open');
    }
    function renderLexicon() {
      const entries = Object.values(wordListenStats).sort((a,b) => b.total-a.total || Number(b.last || 0)-Number(a.last || 0));
      const total = entries.reduce((sum,entry) => sum+Number(entry.total || 0),0);
      const cultureTotal = entries.reduce((sum,entry) => sum+Number(entry.culture || 0),0);
      const stampTotal = entries.reduce((sum,entry) => sum+Number(entry.stamp || 0),0);
      $('#lexiconTotalListens').textContent = String(total); $('#lexiconUnique').textContent = String(entries.length); $('#lexiconCultureCount').textContent = String(cultureTotal); $('#lexiconStampCount').textContent = String(stampTotal);
      const list = $('#lexiconList'); list.replaceChildren();
      if (!entries.length) {
        const empty = document.createElement('p'); empty.className = 'page-copy'; empty.textContent = textFor('Premi ▶ accanto a una parola: qui comincerà a comparire la tua traccia di ascolto.','Press ▶ beside a word and your listening trace will begin to appear here.'); list.append(empty); return;
      }
      entries.slice(0,60).forEach((entry,index) => {
        const row = document.createElement('div'); row.className = 'lexicon-row';
        const rank = document.createElement('i'); rank.textContent = String(index+1).padStart(2,'0');
        const word = document.createElement('b'); word.textContent = entry.word;
        const source = document.createElement('span'); source.textContent = textFor('STORIE ' + (entry.culture || 0) + ' · FRANCOBOLLI ' + (entry.stamp || 0),'STORIES ' + (entry.culture || 0) + ' · STAMPS ' + (entry.stamp || 0));
        const totalLabel = document.createElement('em'); totalLabel.textContent = String(entry.total) + '× ' + textFor('ASCOLTI','LISTENS');
        row.append(rank,word,source,totalLabel); list.append(row);
      });
    }

    function applyLanguage() {
      document.documentElement.lang = lang === 'en' ? 'en' : 'it';
      document.body.dataset.lang = lang;
      document.body.classList.toggle('bilingual',lang === 'bi');
      $$('[data-lang]').forEach(button => button.classList.toggle('on',button.dataset.lang === lang));
      $$('[data-i18n]').forEach(element => localizedKey(element,element.dataset.i18n));
      $$('[data-it][data-en]').forEach(element => localized(element,element.dataset.it,element.dataset.en));
      const categoryKeys = ['all','city','food','museum','style','literature','curiosity'];
      $$('#cultureCats button').forEach((button,index) => localizedKey(button,categoryKeys[index]));
      $('#homeBtn').setAttribute('aria-label',textFor('Torna alla pagina iniziale','Return to home'));
      $('#addBtn').setAttribute('aria-label',textFor('Importa un file','Import a file'));
      $('#importBtn').setAttribute('aria-label',textFor('Importa audio o video','Import audio or video'));
      $('#italyMap').setAttribute('aria-label',textFor('Mappa delle regioni d’Italia','Map of the regions of Italy'));
      if (current) {
        const isVideo = (current.type && current.type.startsWith('video')) || /\.(mp4|m4v|mov|webm)$/i.test(current.originalName || '');
        localized($('#mediaKind'),isVideo ? I18N.it.mediaVideo : I18N.it.mediaAudio,isVideo ? I18N.en.mediaVideo : I18N.en.mediaAudio);
      }
      renderLearning();
      renderTime();
      renderScenes();
      renderAlbum(true);
      renderJourney();
      renderCulture();
      renderLexicon();
      renderLibrary();
      renderMapLanguage();
      updateClock();
      if ($('#sceneModeModal').classList.contains('open') && pendingTimeBasis) openSceneModePrompt(pendingTimeBasis);
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-language-v6',lang);
    }

    $('#homeBtn').onclick = () => switchView('home');
    $('#albumExitBtn').onclick = () => switchView(current ? 'player' : 'home');
    $('#libraryBtn').onclick = openDrawer;
    $('#closeDrawer').onclick = closeDrawer;
    $('#scrim').onclick = closeDrawer;
    $$('.nav-button').forEach(button => {
      button.onclick = () => switchView(button.dataset.view);
    });
    $$('#languageSwitch button').forEach(button => {
      button.onclick = () => {
        lang = button.dataset.lang;
        applyLanguage();
      };
    });
    $('#addBtn').onclick = () => $('#fileInput').click();
    $('#importBtn').onclick = () => $('#fileInput').click();
    $('#fileInput').onchange = () => {
      const file = $('#fileInput').files[0];
      if (!file) return;
      if (!mediaSupported(file)) {
        showToast(textFor(I18N.it.invalidMedia,I18N.en.invalidMedia));
        $('#fileInput').value = '';
        return;
      }
      openRenameForFile(file);
    };
    $('#renameClose').onclick = () => closeRename();
    $('#renameCancel').onclick = () => closeRename();
    $('#renameConfirm').onclick = confirmRename;
    $('#renameInput').addEventListener('keydown',event => {
      if (event.key === 'Enter') confirmRename();
    });
    $('#renameCurrentBtn').onclick = () => {
      if (current) openRenameForRow(current);
    };
    $('#centerBtn').onclick = togglePlay;
    $('#playBtn').onclick = togglePlay;
    $('#backBtn').onclick = () => {
      if (media) seekTo(media.currentTime-3);
    };
    $('#forwardBtn').onclick = () => {
      if (media) seekTo(media.currentTime+3);
    };
    $('#markStartBtn').onclick = () => markClipBoundary('a');
    $('#markEndBtn').onclick = () => markClipBoundary('b');
    $('#playSegmentBtn').onclick = playSelectedSegment;
    $('#seek').oninput = event => seekTo(+event.target.value);
    $('#startRange').oninput = event => {
      clipA = Math.min(+event.target.value,clipB-.1);
      updateTimeline();
    };
    $('#endRange').oninput = event => {
      clipB = Math.max(+event.target.value,clipA+.1);
      updateTimeline();
    };
    $('#clipAInput').addEventListener('change',event => setClipFromInput('a',event.currentTarget));
    $('#clipBInput').addEventListener('change',event => setClipFromInput('b',event.currentTarget));
    [$('#clipAInput'),$('#clipBInput')].forEach((input,index) => input.addEventListener('keydown',event => {
      if (event.key === 'Enter') {
        event.preventDefault();
        setClipFromInput(index ? 'b' : 'a',event.currentTarget);
        event.currentTarget.blur();
      }
    }));
    $$('[data-nudge]').forEach(button => {
      button.onclick = () => nudge(button.dataset.nudge);
    });
    $('#speed').onchange = event => {
      if (media) media.playbackRate = +event.target.value;
    };
    $('#toggleSourceBtn').onclick = () => $('#sourcePane').classList.toggle('concealed');
    $('#importTranscriptBtn').onclick = () => $('#transcriptInput').click();
    $('#transcriptInput').onchange = async event => {
      const file = event.currentTarget.files[0];
      if (!file) return;
      $('#sourceText').value = tidyTranscript(await file.text());
      $('#sourcePane').classList.remove('concealed');
      if (current) {
        current.transcript = $('#sourceText').value;
        saveMedia(current).catch(() => {});
      }
      event.currentTarget.value = '';
    };
    $('#sourceText').addEventListener('change',() => {
      if (!current) return;
      current.transcript = $('#sourceText').value;
      saveMedia(current).catch(() => {});
    });
    $('#checkDictationBtn').onclick = checkDictation;
    $('#mindClearBtn').onclick = openFocusRitual;
    $('#focusFinish').onclick = finishFocusRitual;
    $('#readyButton').onclick = beginFocusCountdown;
    $('#focusClose').onclick = closeFocusRitual;
    $('#loopButtons').onclick = event => {
      const button = event.target.closest('[data-loop]');
      if (!button) return;
      loops = +button.dataset.loop;
      loopIndex = 0;
      $$('[data-loop]').forEach(item => item.classList.toggle('on',item === button));
      $('#loopAll').textContent = loops || '∞';
      $('#loopNow').textContent = '0';
    };
    $('#freeMode').onclick = () => {
      learningModeActive = false;
      segmentLoopActive = false;
      loopIndex = 0;
      $('#playSegmentBtn').classList.remove('on');
      $('#freeMode').classList.add('on');
      $('#learnMode').classList.remove('on');
      $('#learningPanel').classList.remove('open');
    };
    $('#learnMode').onclick = () => {
      learningModeActive = true;
      segmentLoopActive = false;
      loopIndex = 0;
      $('#playSegmentBtn').classList.remove('on');
      $('#learnMode').classList.add('on');
      $('#freeMode').classList.remove('on');
      $('#learningPanel').classList.add('open');
      renderLearning();
    };
    $('#previousStep').onclick = () => {
      learningStep = Math.max(0,learningStep-1);
      renderLearning();
    };
    $('#nextStep').onclick = () => {
      if (learningStep < 5) {
        learningStep++;
        renderLearning();
      } else {
        showToast(textFor(I18N.it.sessionComplete,I18N.en.sessionComplete));
      }
    };
    $('#saveClip').onclick = () => {
      if (!current) return;
      let clips = [];
      try { clips = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gelato-clips-v2') || '[]'); } catch (error) {}
      clips.push({mediaId:current.id,a:clipA,b:clipB,createdAt:Date.now()});
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-clips-v2',JSON.stringify(clips));
      showToast(textFor(I18N.it.clipSaved,I18N.en.clipSaved));
    };
    $('#maskBtn').onclick = () => {
      const on = $('#captionMask').classList.toggle('on');
      $('#maskBtn').classList.toggle('on',on);
      $('#maskPanel').classList.toggle('open',on);
      if (on) scheduleMaskPanelHide();
      else clearTimeout(maskPanelTimer);
    };
    $('#maskWidth').oninput = event => {
      $('#captionMask').style.width = event.target.value + '%';
      scheduleMaskPanelHide();
    };
    $('#maskHeight').oninput = event => {
      $('#captionMask').style.height = event.target.value + '%';
      scheduleMaskPanelHide();
    };
    $('#maskLevel').oninput = event => {
      $('#captionMask').style.bottom = event.target.value + '%';
      scheduleMaskPanelHide();
    };
    $('#maskPanel').addEventListener('pointerdown',scheduleMaskPanelHide);
    $('#maskPanel').addEventListener('pointermove',event => { if (event.buttons) scheduleMaskPanelHide(); });
    $('#theaterBtn').onclick = async () => {
      try {
        if (document.fullscreenElement) await document.exitFullscreen();
        else await $('#stage').requestFullscreen();
      } catch (error) {}
    };
    document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange',() => {
      $('#theaterBtn').classList.toggle('on',Boolean(document.fullscreenElement));
    });
    document.addEventListener('keydown',event => {
      if (['INPUT','TEXTAREA','SELECT'].includes(event.target.tagName)) return;
      if (event.code === 'Space') {
        event.preventDefault();
        togglePlay();
      }
      if (event.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
        event.preventDefault();
        if (media) seekTo(media.currentTime-3);
      }
      if (event.key === 'ArrowRight') {
        event.preventDefault();
        if (media) seekTo(media.currentTime+3);
      }
      if (event.key === 'Escape') {
        $$('.modal.open').forEach(modal => modal.classList.remove('open'));
        $('#stampImmersive').classList.remove('open');
        if ($('#focusRitual').classList.contains('open')) closeFocusRitual();
      }
    });
    $('#mediaRecordFilter').onclick = event => {
      const button = event.target.closest('[data-media-record]');
      if (!button) return;
      recordMediaFilter = button.dataset.mediaRecord;
      $$('#mediaRecordFilter button').forEach(item => item.classList.toggle('on',item === button));
      renderProgress();
    };
    $('#rangeRecordFilter').onclick = event => {
      const button = event.target.closest('[data-range-record]');
      if (!button) return;
      recordRange = button.dataset.rangeRecord;
      $$('#rangeRecordFilter button').forEach(item => item.classList.toggle('on',item === button));
      $('#customDates').classList.toggle('open',recordRange === 'custom');
      renderProgress();
    };
    $('#recordStartDate').onchange = renderProgress;
    $('#recordEndDate').onchange = renderProgress;
    $('#timeBasisButtons').onclick = event => {
      const button = event.target.closest('[data-time-basis]');
      if (!button) return;
      selectedClockBasis = button.dataset.timeBasis;
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-clock-basis-v8',selectedClockBasis);
      $$('#timeBasisButtons button').forEach(item => item.classList.toggle('on',item === button));
      $('#customSceneTime').classList.toggle('open',selectedClockBasis === 'custom');
      openSceneModePrompt(selectedClockBasis);
    };
    $('#customSceneTime').oninput = () => {
      if (selectedClockBasis !== 'custom') return;
      if (timeBasis === 'custom') applyScene(sceneForHour(basisParts().hour),true,true);
      updateClock();
    };
    $('#sceneVisualBtn').onclick = () => $('#sceneVisualPanel').classList.toggle('open');
    $('#sceneNextButton').onclick = () => applyScene((sceneIndex + 1) % scenes.length,true,false);
    $$('.scene-quality button').forEach(button => button.onclick = () => {
      sceneQuality = button.dataset.sceneQuality;
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-scene-quality-v9',sceneQuality);
      applySceneTheme();
    });
    $('#sceneBlur').oninput = event => {
      sceneBlur = Number(event.target.value);
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-scene-blur-v9',String(sceneBlur));
      applySceneTheme();
    };
    $('#customWallpaperBtn').onclick = () => $('#customWallpaperInput').click();
    $('#customWallpaperInput').onchange = event => {
      storeCustomWallpaper(event.currentTarget.files[0]);
      event.currentTarget.value = '';
    };
    $('#sceneModeClose').onclick = () => $('#sceneModeModal').classList.remove('open');
    $('#sceneModeModal').onclick = event => { if (event.target.id === 'sceneModeModal') event.currentTarget.classList.remove('open'); };
    $('#sceneFollowChoice').onclick = () => {
      if (!pendingTimeBasis) return;
      timeBasis = pendingTimeBasis;
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-time-basis-v7',timeBasis);
      $('#sceneModeModal').classList.remove('open');
      applyScene(sceneForHour(basisParts().hour),true,true);
      updateClock();
    };
    $('#sceneKeepChoice').onclick = () => {
      timeBasis = 'manual';
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-time-basis-v7',timeBasis);
      $('#sceneModeModal').classList.remove('open');
      applyScene(sceneIndex,false,true);
      updateClock();
    };
    $('#pocketWatch').onclick = () => {
      $('#timeBasisButtons').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'});
      $('#pocketWatch').classList.add('touched');
      setTimeout(() => $('#pocketWatch').classList.remove('touched'),700);
    };
    $('#sampleStampBtn').onclick = () => openStampPreview(0,true);
    $('#fullWallBtn').onclick = previewCompleteWall;
    $('#closeWallPreview').onclick = closeCompleteWallPreview;
    $('#chooseStampBtn').onclick = openStampChoices;
    $('#stampChoiceClose').onclick = () => $('#stampChoiceModal').classList.remove('open');
    $('#stampChoiceModal').onclick = event => {
      if (event.target.id === 'stampChoiceModal') event.currentTarget.classList.remove('open');
    };
    $('#previewClose').onclick = () => $('#stampPreview').classList.remove('open');
    $('#stampPreview').onclick = event => {
      if (event.target.id === 'stampPreview') event.currentTarget.classList.remove('open');
    };
    $('#stampWordsBtn').onclick = () => $('#stampWords').classList.toggle('open');
    $('#stampNarrationBtn').onclick = event => speakItalian(event.currentTarget.dataset.speech || '');
    $('#cultureNarrationBtn').onclick = event => speakItalian(event.currentTarget.dataset.speech || '');
    $('#openImmersive').onclick = openImmersive;
    $('#immersiveClose').onclick = () => $('#stampImmersive').classList.remove('open');
    $('#immersiveStage').addEventListener('pointermove',moveMagnifier);
    $('#immersiveStage').addEventListener('pointerleave',() => {
      $('#magnifier').style.display = 'none';
      $('#immersiveImage').style.filter = 'drop-shadow(0 35px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.55))';
    });
    $('#mapLamp').onclick = () => {
      $('#mapWrap').classList.toggle('lights-off');
      renderJourney();
    };
    $('#cultureCats').onclick = event => {
      const button = event.target.closest('[data-cat]');
      if (!button) return;
      cultureFilter = button.dataset.cat;
      $$('#cultureCats button').forEach(item => item.classList.toggle('on',item === button));
      renderCulture();
    };
    $('#closeCulture').onclick = () => $('#cultureDialog').classList.remove('open');
    $('#cultureDialog').onclick = event => {
      if (event.target.id === 'cultureDialog') event.currentTarget.classList.remove('open');
    };
    $('#dialogDone').onclick = () => {
      if (activeCulture === null) return;
      let done = [];
      try { done = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('gelato-culture-done') || '[]'); } catch (error) {}
      if (!done.includes(activeCulture)) done.push(activeCulture);
      localStorage.setItem('gelato-culture-done',JSON.stringify(done));
      $('#cultureDialog').classList.remove('open');
      showToast(textFor('Una nuova luce sulla mappa!','A new light on the map!'));
      renderJourney();
    };
    const initialDate = new Date();
    const initialStart = new Date(initialDate);initialStart.setDate(initialStart.getDate()-6);
    $('#recordStartDate').value = localDateKey(initialStart);
    $('#recordEndDate').value = localDateKey(initialDate);
    renderScenes();
    renderLearning();
    renderTime();
    renderAlbum(true);
    renderLibrary();
    updateClock();
    setInterval(updateClock,30000);
    loadItalyMap();
    loadStampArchive();
    applyLanguage();
    switchView('home',true);
  })();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
